100.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through gaps in the trees
100.text: The moss is pleasant under your feet as you trailblaze through the dense forest. Go to 105[/b].

100.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west toward a top-heavy boulder
100.text: You hope your water-soaked toes will dry before you start getting blisters. Go to 410[/b].

101.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal to clear a path north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
101.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 106[/b].
A menagerie of forest creatures stares at you as you float past them downstream. Go to 472[/b].

102.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north, using the shallow stream as a trail
102.text: The stone rings along the stream look both crafted and natural at the same time. Go to 107[/b].

102.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south around the outskirts of a city
102.text: The pleasant cacophony of the brightly colored birds here reminds you of an orchestra warming up. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the city from the north
choices.outcome: Go to city 526[/b].

choices.option: Steer clear of the city, heading into the shallows of a sea after you break free of the jungle
choices.outcome: Go to 473[/b].

choices.option: Follow the stream north as it winds around the hill
choices.outcome: Go to 108[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 take and place your palm on the door in the hill
choices.outcome: The stone slides to the side, exposing a gaping cavern. Go to cave 095[/b].

103.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south out into open water
103.text: You push through the foliage and step into the vast sea beyond. Gain ability 1489[/b] and go to 474[/b].

104.text: A large animal bathing in the waterfall doesn’t notice you as you hike by. Go to 475[/b].

105.text: You follow a flash of pink that stands out from the green of the dense jungle. Go to 100[/b].
At each water crossing, you have renewed gratitude for the lack of mosquitoes on this expedition. Go to 411[/b].

106.text: You breathe sparingly as you trailblaze in case inhaling the mushrooms’ spores causes any nasty side effects. Go to 107[/b].

106.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up the wet cliff
106.text: The stone surface is slippery, but you make it to the top of the waterfall. Go to 111[/b].
Do you hear something skittering on the jungle floor, or is it just the branches you’re pushing out of your way? Go to 101[/b].

107.text: The thick jungle vines assist you as you ascend the slippery waterfall. Go to 112[/b].
The rhythmic sloshing around your ankles lulls you into a sense of serenity. Go to 102[/b].
Your progress is slow, and you hope your crew is having an easier time. Go to 106[/b].

108.text: Oddly, you glimpse other animals heading the same direction as you. Go to 109[/b].
The bright reflections off the shield and the water make you wish your sunglasses survived the crash. Go to 103[/b].

109.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
109.text: It’s hard to avoid making noise while carrying your gear. You wish you had some help. Go to 114[/b].

109.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] west through the dense forest
109.text: The thick ceiling of leaves keeps you safe from sunburn… you just hope there’s no poison ivy. Go to 108[/b].

110.text: The first rock is easy to climb, but each successive boulder is significantly larger than the last. You finally emerge at the edge of a lake. Go to 115[/b].

111.text: You are remarkably successful at telling yourself not to worry about whatever broke that orb! Go to 112[/b].

111.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the waterfall to an ancient grove
111.text: Following the water downstream should lead to the coast eventually, right? Go to 106[/b].

112.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up the slippery cliff
112.text: The constant spray of the waterfall makes the rocky cliff face difficult to grip, but you manage to reach the top; as you pull yourself over the ledge, you notice an elegant bird watching you silently. Go to 117[/b] and gain 1 morale.

112.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down a small waterfall using vines for leverage
112.text: The vines are slick from the water, but so plentiful that you have no trouble finding handholds. Go to 107[/b].
You keep telling yourself that the bizarre life forms are out to get you. Go to 111[/b].

113.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up the slippery cliff
113.text: At the top of the cliff, you’re greeted by a view of the surrounding area. View page 41 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost, then go to 118[/b].

114.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the hill or [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] into the depths of the well

choices.outcome: You climb the steep hill and then walk back down to a shoreline on the far side. Go to 119[/b].
The slick stones lining the interior of the well provide weak footing at best, and you tumble into the darkness. Go to cave 095[/b].

115.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east across the gaps in the bridge
115.text: With a running start, you clear the first gap by a comfortable margin but the second, longer gap by so little that when you land your foot breaks off a piece of stone that falls into the river below. Go to 116[/b] and gain 1 morale.

115.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north to the far shoreline
115.text: Besides natural stones, you also see chunks of masonry in the water beneath you. Go to 120[/b].

115.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south over the cliff’s edge
115.text: As you head south, you find yourself facing a series of broad, steep boulders. Go to 110[/b].

116.text: The water flows directly through the surrounding hills, as if in a trough. Go to 111[/b].
Though you’re careful of the turbulent water, your pace quickens with anticipation! Go to 115[/b].

117.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from stone to stone
117.text: As you hop along the stones, you notice that the wide-beaked bird perched on one of them bears an uncanny resemblance to the frogmouths of Old Earth. Go up the river to 122[/b].
As you gently lower yourself over the edge of the slick escarpment, you notice there’s something familiar about the dignified-looking bird watching you descend. Go to 112[/b] and gain 1 morale.

118.text: Leaving the animal’s territory, the beams of light piercing the sky catch your attention. Go to 123[/b].

118.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down a slippery cliff
118.text: The base of the cliff gives way to a vast jungle. Go to 113[/b].

119.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north toward the metallic building
119.text: The organic fragrance of the blooms quickly fades as the metal facade looms closer. Go to 124[/b].

119.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south down the hill toward a well
119.text: The steep grade of the hill is brutal on your knees, and you’re happy to find a wishing well at the bottom. Go to 114[/b].

120.text: The best reason to swim toward a volcano is that the warm water is almost like visiting a spa. Go to 481[/b].

120.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south through the warm waters
120.text: You don’t like the look of that eruption and decide to put more distance between it and you. Go to 115[/b].
The whole area seems to be shaking, so you head off to explore what hasn’t been damaged yet. Go to 414[/b].

121.text: What a tranquil scene! Surely nothing hectic could happen on a day such as this. Go to 482[/b].

122.text: You make a mental note to look for more transmission towers; they could prove useful. Go to 483[/b].

122.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south across a series of stones
122.text: You haven’t played hopscotch since you were a kid. Never thought it would come in handy… go figure. Go to 117[/b].

123.text: The wind and shadows seem to move in odd bursts that don’t match the lazy clouds in the sky. Go to 118[/b].

124.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the building to the north through the front door or  [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north around the building

choices.outcome: Shocked by your insolence, a guard tries to shove you backwards, which you use as an opening. Roll X dice; if at least 1 result is look, the guard falls for your feint and you go to interior 554[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost and continue.
You try to stay in the metal sentients’ good graces and keep a respectful distance. Go to 485[/b].

124.text: The structure is reminiscent of a face with unblinking, unnerving eyes. Go to 119[/b].

125.text: Roll 2 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 look[/b] to spot and avoid the molten cracks in the ground. Go to 130[/b].

125.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across a narrow strait
125.text: The air shimmers in the heat and you back away before it saps any more of your strength. Go to 376[/b].

126.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] east up and over the sheer rock wall
126.text: The rock wall is hot to the touch, reminding you of the particularly high cost of falling during this ascent. You manage to pull yourself over the top and lower yourself into a comparatively hospitable canyon. Go to 127[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You feel exposed to the elements… and any watching eyes. Go to 131[/b].

126.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across the warm waters
126.text: Swimming is great for your cardiovascular system that’s still adjusting to the alien air. Go to 377[/b].

127.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward a group of merchants
127.text: You head toward the vendors, eager to see if they have anything you can use. Go to 378[/b].

127.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up and over the sheer rock wall
127.text: As you crest the rock wall, you see a shallow pool of lava that makes the west side of the wall much less inviting than the east side you just came from. Go to 126[/b] and gain 1 morale.

128.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east from stone to stone
128.text: The difference between running away and tactical maneuvering is just timing. Go to 129[/b].

128.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the sentient and wade through the water (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
128.text: You stay on rocks wherever possible, and in the shallowest water when necessary. Go to 133[/b].

128.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south over lava after crossing a narrow strait
128.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 look[/b] to avoid a scalding stone. Go to 379[/b].

129.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south from stone to stone
129.text: Watching your footing constantly takes so much mental focus you almost forget your mission. Go to 380[/b].

129.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] west over the water using the stones
129.text: Seeing the rocks float makes you wonder if you can defy gravity too. Go to 128[/b].

013.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] into the tunnel to the west
013.text: The narrow tunnel curves and winds down into the earth. The darkness finally gives way to a glowing green chamber. Go to cave 097[/b].

130.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the gambling sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
130.text: You take a last furtive glance at the rolling dice, one of the few familiar objects in this strange realm. Go to 135[/b].

130.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] south across the lava fields
130.text: Roll 2 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then suffer 1 heat damage unless you pay 1 look[/b] to spot and avoid the molten cracks in the ground. Then go to 125[/b].

131.text: The steep cliff leads east to the edge of a lake. Go to 132[/b].

131.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep drop
131.text: The drop off is so steep that you question why anyone would pitch a tent right on the ledge. Go to 136[/b] and gain 1 morale.

131.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward some glowing boulders
131.text: The bright red shapes in the distance make it easy to keep your bearings. Go to 126[/b].

132.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north toward the ice-capped mountains
132.text: The water is frigid and choppy, leaving your extremities almost numb by the time you pull yourself ashore. Go to 137[/b], gain 1 morale, and suffer 1 cold damage.

132.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up to an encampment
132.text: You’re out of breath from the elevation gain, but the view is worth it. Go to 131[/b].

133.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north along the mossy path
133.text: The lush moss is so pleasant to walk on compared to the abundance of rocks. Go to 138[/b].
Is this a friend or foe? You hope for the best but prepare for the worst. Go to 128[/b].

134.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north along a narrow string of boulders jutting out of the water
134.text: You turn the task into a game by pretending you’re on the balance beam in the Galactic Olympics. Go to 139[/b].

135.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east through the tall grass
135.text: The grass snags your outfit as you hike east. Go to 136[/b].

135.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north along the rocky shoreline
135.text: You don’t see the Traveler move at all, yet even after leaving them behind, they’re right back in front of you when you arrive. Go to 140[/b].

135.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west to a tiny island
135.text: Maybe you can find more items on the outskirts of the crumbling buildings. Go to 406[/b].

136.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the steep cliff
136.text: You catch a glimpse of what looks like a red tent at the top of the cliff. Go to 131[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You wade through the waist-high grass to ruins that no longer offer much shelter but still offer a great view of the coastline. Go to 135[/b].

137.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south across the frigid lake
137.text: The water is shockingly cold, even by the standards of glacial lakes. Go to 132[/b], gain 1 morale, and suffer 1 cold damage.

138.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north through the rolling hills
138.text: You try to think of a reason why there would only be a single lotus on the hillside. Go to 143[/b].

138.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] south along a narrow string of mossy boulders
138.text: You try to convince yourself otherwise, but you’re secretly beginning to enjoy your time on the planet. Go to 133[/b].

139.text: The gentle water feels nice between your toes as you head north to 144[/b].

139.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] south along a mossy path
139.text: The bones in the grass look ominous enough to seek out a different path. Go to 134[/b].

014.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

140.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south along the rocky shore
140.text: As you hike along the shore, you pass by the ruins of a large building at the top of the seaside cliff. Go to 135[/b].

140.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west toward a similar rock structure
140.text: The concept of energy being sent through rock formations makes you wonder what else is possible here. Go to 407[/b].

141.text: The bones add a sense of adventure during your tour of this new world. Go to 146[/b].

142.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward the smell of saltwater
142.text: The metallic scent is quickly replaced by a pleasant ocean breeze wafting up from the shore. Go to 147[/b].

143.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south across the rolling hills
143.text: A piece of wreckage could have served as a toboggan on the grass, were it not for the rust. Go to 138[/b].

144.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the steep, slick hill
144.text: You’ve never seen such green grass! It would be great for a picnic if you had the time. Go to 149[/b].

144.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south from one mossy rock to the next
144.text: The moss is exceptionally springy. Go to 139[/b].

145.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east off the cliff into the water
145.text: Roll 2 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 look[/b] to avoid a sharp rock on your way down. Go to 146[/b].
The waves seem to stretch on forever, but eventually you pull yourself up on a verdant shoreline. Go to 471[/b] and gain 1 morale.

146.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north across the vast sea
146.text: After an exhausting swim, your muscles ache, but the view of a glistening waterfall pouring into the forest below lifts your spirits. Go to 472[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The bird calls fade as you leave the shore, and the quiet offers a time for reflection. Go to 141[/b].

146.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up the steep cliff
146.text: You struggle to maintain your grip on the slick, concave cliff wall, but finally you pull yourself over the overhang and onto the soft grass. Gain ability 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to 145[/b].

147.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east toward a shadow under the waves
147.text: Unless you have item 1232[/b], as you splash into the water, a colossal beast rises from the sea, surveying its fresh prey. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Go east to 148[/b].
The small flock of seabirds follows you on your exhausting swim north across the sea, as if cheering you on. Go to 473[/b] and gain 1 morale.

147.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward some rusty wreckage
147.text: The water looks too vast to cross at the moment, but the debris you saw may prove useful. Go to 142[/b].

148.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north along the beach before wading across an inlet
148.text: Your feet leave footprints in the sand as you trek north and slowly ease into the shallows. Go to 474[/b].

Unless you have item 1232[/b], as you splash into the water, a colossal beast rises from the sea, surveying its fresh prey. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b]. Go west to 147[/b].

149.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south down the steep hill
149.text: The hike is grueling on your thighs as you head downhill. Go to 144[/b].

015.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

150.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north to the next island
150.text: The currents and crosscurrents make the swim even longer than it looked from shore. Go to 155[/b] and gain 1 morale.

150.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] fireballs to move south around the volcano
150.text: The volcano never ceases to erupt as you circumnavigate it. Go to 481[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You splash through the warm water. Go to 416[/b].

151.text: The formation gives you a strong reminder of the old “duck or rabbit” optical illusion. Go to 156[/b].

151.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south around a burning city
151.text: A recent eruption of a nearby volcano has left the city a smoldering pile of rubble. You head toward the sounds of people just to the south of the ruins. Go to 482[/b].

152.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from rock to rock
152.text: The little island is strangely compelling. Go to 157[/b].

As you stroll toward some boulders off the shoreline, you pass a piece of your ship wreckage. It’s part of the propulsion system and could become flightworthy with a bit of work. You may either go south to 483[/b] or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action (then read the next result only).

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 1 boost and destiny 1605[/b] (place it in the center). You may either stop (go south to 483[/b]) or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still unfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and 1 help[/b]. You may either stop (go south to 483[/b]) or continue with a help--REPAIR[/b][/b] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle 1434[/b] and go south to 483[/b].

153.text: The amulet dominates your thoughts as you swim. Go to 158[/b].
You think you’ll get more help from science than magic. Go to 484[/b].

154.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east toward some towering rock formations
154.text: You’re not sure your gear could withstand volcanic heat. Go to 438[/b].
You think you can find a part of the shore that is protected from lava. Go to 159[/b].

154.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south to some distant rocks jutting out of the water
154.text: You struggle a bit against the current as the water is pulled toward the seismic cracks. Go to 485[/b].

155.text: Crossing lines dominate the northern sky. Are those contrails from other ships? Go to 160[/b].

155.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south to a small island
155.text: The swim is long, but eventually you pull yourself ashore on an island that is empty save for an improbably balanced igneous rock formation. Go to 150[/b] and gain 1 morale.

156.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north to the nearby island
156.text: The flashes of light up ahead remind you of the fireworks you avoided as a child. Go to 161[/b].
The rock formations make it impossible to travel in a straight line. Go to 151[/b].

157.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the shallow sea
157.text: The air in front of you seems to vibrate and sweat starts to bead on your forehead. Go to 162[/b].

157.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south across the rocky inlet
157.text: Staying above the water reminds you of playing “the floor is lava” in your childhood home. Go to 152[/b].

158.text: As you hike north, you notice a dark cave to your right. You may either enter it (go to cave 039[/b]) or go north to 163[/b].
The sea life is so intriguing you wish you had a mask and snorkel. Go to 153[/b].

159.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over the lavafall and past the sentients
159.text: You know better than to follow the sentients into the lava. Go to 164[/b].
The lava entering the water behind you makes a cloud of steam that’s hard to see through. Go to 154[/b].

016.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

160.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south with the tide to another island
160.text: This archipelago comprises dozens of little islands. You swim past a few until you find one that looks intriguing. Go to 155[/b].

161.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] the lava bursts, making your way north
161.text: You’re sweating profusely, but you make it through with only minor singed spots on your clothes. Go to 166[/b].

161.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward some odd rock formations
161.text: Escaping the heat becomes your top priority. Go to 156[/b].

162.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the warm water
162.text: The water warms to the temperature of a pleasant bath as you near the incandescent city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 525[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 167[/b].

162.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south across the shallow sea
162.text: The giant rune on the rock above the city will be a good landmark for your navigation. Go to 157[/b].

163.text: Acknowledging the Traveler’s warning, you still press north. Go to 168[/b].

164.text: Dodging the molten puddles takes all your concentration. Go to 159[/b].

165.text: Seeing a piece of your ship reminds you how lucky you are to have survived. Go to 170[/b].

166.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the warm water
166.text: As you pass the wind chimes, you’re eerily reminded of the jangling of hollow bones. Go to 171[/b].

166.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward a glowing sentient
166.text: Music at your back and lights up ahead—it’s like you’re at a party! Go to 161[/b].

167.text: The fire sentient’s glow is so faint as you pass that you worry for its health. Go to 172[/b].

168.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
168.text: Mercifully the monumental fire elemental seems too busy with the fire-breathing insects circling it to notice you slowly circumnavigating it from a great distance. Go to 173[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

168.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward a large animal
168.text: Surely the animal’s instinct to stay away from the elemental’s home is a good one. Go to 163[/b].

169.text: You swim to the north a respectful— and, you hope, safe—distance away from the towering monument. Go to 174[/b] and gain 1 morale.

017.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

170.text: It looks like rough terrain, but you’ll be grateful for dry land again. Go to 250[/b].
That piece sticking out of the water looks awfully familiar… Go to 165[/b].

171.text: The north looks less volcanic; will it have other dangers instead? Go to 251[/b].

171.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south through the warm water
171.text: The lava that solidified in the water makes for a very uneven surface. Go to 166[/b].

172.text: When you reach the shore, choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 251[/b].

choices.option: Hike north up the steep mountain
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and go to 252[/b].

172.text: The trek makes you long for the gorp you nibbled on during childhood strolls with your parents. Go to 167[/b].

173.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north through the warm bay
173.text: Who (or what) receives the enhanced signal beaming into the sky? Go to 253[/b].

173.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a fiery elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
173.text: You’ve picked a tactically questionable place to cross the sea, but the elemental maintains its gaze to the south and doesn’t notice your approach. Go to 168[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

174.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north across the slippery rocks
174.text: Nodding deferentially to the sentient as you pass, you’re eager to press on. Go to 254[/b].
As you swim through the volcanic archipelago, you spot a towering lavafall pouring from an opening in a small mountain. Go to 169[/b] and gain 1 morale.

175.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the swift sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
175.text: You’re probably not fast enough to outrun the winged sentient, but you bolt through the plains to the north until you spot a breezier sentient relaxing in another tent. Go to 180[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

176.action: [b][MOVE] DANCE[/b] north into and around the twisters
176.text: You were expecting to go north, but you’re surprised to feel the grip of the sentients’ hands in yours as they dance with you, delighted that you’d join in their revelry. A tingling sensation runs up your spine. Eventually you bid farewell and go to 181[/b]. Also gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

177.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] north across the field of flags
177.text: Sentients jeer at you for stomping on their sacred field. Gain curse 1387[/b] and 1 boost; go to 182[/b].

178.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
178.text: You weave between the sentient and the towering blooms, ignoring the copious airborne pollen and dust, and bolt to the north. Go to 183[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

178.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south across the sand dunes
178.text: You briefly consider trying to slide down the dunes on a huge flower petal before dismissing the idea. Go to 348[/b].

179.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the blissfully unaware sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
179.text: The flowers looming overhead are downright Seussian. Go to 184[/b].
Thankfully the huge flowers provide relief from the desert sun. Go to 349[/b].

018.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

180.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south around a busy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
180.text: Sentients seem to be all around you; you wonder if they know each other. Go to 175[/b].

181.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
181.text: The sentients tighten their hold on the chest but make no effort to stop you as you go to 186[/b].
The wind tugs at your clothes, gear, and anything else it can find. Go to 176[/b].

182.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentients, jumping to your feet and racing ahead (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
182.text: You dodge the sentients and sprint north across the open prairie. Go to 187[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

182.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] south across a field of flags
182.text: A sentient angrily informs you this is sacred ground. Gain curse 1387[/b] and 1 boost; go to 177[/b].

185.text: You stick close to the ruins, both for a barrier to the wind and to admire the sculpted flourishes. Go to 190[/b].

186.text: You resist the urge to tilt at the windmills. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 518[/b].
Go to 191[/b].

188.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the shallow bay
188.text: Passing the windmill on your way to the water makes you wonder if the planet also utilizes hydropower. Go to 193[/b].

189.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from one sandbar to the next
189.text: You make a game out of hopping along the path of banners on the few dry patches you can find. Go to 194[/b].

019.text: Return to the cave location from which you originally entered the dungeon.

190.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north across the wetlands and up the hill
190.text: Your feet are slick with mud as you begin to trek up the slope. You pass by the entrance to the cave, the mouth of which is much larger than it appeared from a distance. Choose one:

choices.option: Proceed around the hill to the north
choices.outcome: Go to 195[/b].

choices.option: Perform a look--EXPLORE in the mouth of the cave
choices.outcome: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave 036[/b].

191.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the muddy water
191.text: You consider taking a piece of the shredded tapestry to use as a towel, but you never know who’s watching. Go to 196[/b].
Move either into the town (city 518[/b]) or around the town (location 186[/b]).

193.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south across the shallow bay
193.text: As you descend the hill, you see several objects in motion across the water. Go to 188[/b].

194.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the twister as you head north (if the twister is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
194.text: The gale-force winds leave you unsteady on your feet at first, but you sprint without stopping until you reach (much more tranquil) foothills to the north. Go to 199[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You pick up a family of leeches from the muck, but you eventually arrive at the far shore. Lose 1 health and go to 189[/b].

195.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gate to the north; you may pay $2
195.text: Green lights scan your body as you pass through the gateway. If you paid $2, gain 2 health—the gateway provides a health benefit for those willing to pay. Whether or not you paid, go to 225[/b].

195.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south down the hill and across the shallow water
195.text: The music fades into the distance but keeps playing in your head for quite a while. Go to 190[/b].

196.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north over the mountain pass
196.text: The rainbow beam of light calls to you on a deeper level than you understand. Go to 226[/b].
No use dwelling on the crash; it’s in the past but you have to look ahead. Go to 191[/b].

197.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentient, losing them in the mountain pass (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
197.text: You slow down once you’re sure the sentient isn’t following you and soon find yourself at the top of an escarpment. Go to 227[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

198.text: You marvel at the orb’s narrow perch, taking care not to veer too far off the ridge. Go to 228[/b].

199.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the oblivious sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
199.text: A circular rock formation in the distance looks like a window to the sky. Go to 229[/b].

199.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] south around the twister (if the twister is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
199.text: The whipping winds of the tornado keep you off-balance and the palpable static electricity leaves your hair standing on end. Go to 194[/b] and gain 1 morale.

200.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north through the misty valley
200.text: You descend into the opaque fog below, where the poor visibility and rugged terrain together make navigation all but impossible. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. You may pay 2 look[/b] to go to interior 563[/b]. Otherwise, go to location 205[/b]. Either way, also gain 1 morale.
You barely make a harrowing leap over an icy gorge, then descend the mountain only to find a hulking, magnetic elemental. Go to 393[/b] and gain 1 morale.

201.text: Choose a direction for your leap:

choices.option: Leap over the gap to the left
choices.outcome: Go to 206[/b].

choices.option: Leap over the gap to the right
choices.outcome: As you do, the sentient flies up to you and performs a routine inspection. If you have any weapons, they admonish you and tell you to report to the King of Thieves. Either way, go northeast to 207[/b].

201.text: Amazed at the flying sentient, you long to rise into the air yourself. Go to 712[/b].

202.text: Floating machines, hovering sentients… you start to wonder if you can defy gravity too. Go to 203[/b].

202.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
202.text: The sentient shrugs and returns to their job as you leave them in your wake. Go to 207[/b].

202.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south across the gap after finding a gap in the mountains
202.text: Clouds drift across the crevice. Go to 718[/b].

203.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north across the frozen expanse
203.text: If the brutal cold becomes any more forgiving as you descend into the snow-covered, rocky valley below, you don’t notice it. Gain ability 1505[/b] and 1 morale; go to 208[/b].
Not entirely trusting the floating stones, you are surprised to find them a sturdy launching point. Go to 202[/b].

204.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from one floating lodestone to the next
204.text: Each lodestone shifts under your weight as you leap, and you’re relieved when you finally reach solid ground again. Go to 209[/b].

204.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south past a gloomy mine
204.text: You wonder what prevents the lodestones from becoming magnetized and causing chaos as they float. Go to 730[/b].

205.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the steep slope
205.text: A cruel wind whipping through the frozen canyon makes an already miserable ascent even colder and slower. Go to 210[/b] and gain 1 morale.

205.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south through the cloud cover to an outlook
205.text: You descend into the soupy fog filling the valley, where the uneven ground and thick mist together make navigation all but impractical. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. You may pay 2 look[/b] to go to interior 563[/b]. Otherwise, go to 200[/b]. Either way, also gain 1 morale.

205.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west up the slippery slope
205.text: Careful to avoid the lotuses, you head for something reflective at the top of the ridge. Go to 394[/b].

206.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east down the steep cliff toward a meditating sentient below
206.text: A cruel crosswind makes gripping the icy handholds even harder. Go to 207[/b] and gain 1 morale.

206.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north toward the narrow bridge
206.text: You suspect this freezing city doesn’t draw many tourists. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You stop your journey short of the distant bridge and instead enter the city. Gain 1 time, 1 morale, and 1 move[/b]; go to city 522[/b].
Gain ability 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to 211[/b].

207.text: A clever thief bumps into you on your way up, lightening your purse. Lose $1 and go to 212[/b].
You’re glad to leave with all your belongings (but you still check your pockets). Go to 202[/b].

207.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up the steep mountain
207.text: The few handholds you can find are slick with ice, but you manage to pull yourself over the snowy ledge at the top of the cliff face. Go to 206[/b] and gain 1 morale.

208.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north toward the glowing pyramid
208.text: Each peak of these mountains seems to hide another marvel. Go to 213[/b].

208.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] northeast toward the mysterious staircase
208.text: The staircase winds up the mountain and through a dark passage, and ends at the base of a narrow path. Go to 214[/b].

208.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south through the misty mountains
208.text: Long into your exhausting trek, you pass through a thick layer of clouds, making the pinnacles to your north look like islands in an endless white sea. Gain ability 1505[/b] and 1 morale; go to 203[/b].

209.text: Maybe the animal’s territory isn’t very big and you can find a way around. Go to 416[/b].

209.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
209.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to 214[/b].

209.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south from one floating lodestone to the next
209.text: The stones aren’t fixed in space; they jostle around as you land on them. Go to 204[/b].

210.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the magnetic pull of the object to move north
210.text: Feeling the unmistakable metallic pull, you give the monument a wide berth. Go to 215[/b].

210.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the steep slope
210.text: The fierce wind snaking through the narrow gorge below tests your already tenuous grip on the steep rock wall. Go to 205[/b] and gain 1 morale.

211.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north under the bridge and past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
211.text: The wind funnels under the bridge, making it even colder and muffling the sound of your travel. Go to 216[/b].

211.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the steep slope
211.text: The numbing cold doesn’t become any more sufferable and you descend toward a cliffside and a towering city of metal built along it. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 206[/b].

choices.option: Enter the city as you approach
choices.outcome: You shimmy along the edge of the cliff until you find a narrow, trash-filled alley. Go to city 522[/b].

211.text: Go to 210[/b]. If you have any item of value $10 or higher, the sentient smites you for not selling it to them (gain curse 1391[/b]) but follows you west out of curiosity (gain sentient 1336[/b]).

212.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the animal to proceed north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
212.text: As you head north, you catch a hearty whiff of the large lotus on the right. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Then go to 217[/b].
Is it your imagination or do you see a rainbow ahead of you? Go to 207[/b].

213.text: You exploit a blind spot in the sentinels’ predictable route. Either go north to 218[/b], or suffer 1 heat damage and go to interior 513[/b].

213.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] southeast toward a moving red glow
213.text: You can’t take your eyes off the erratic red object, like a cat with a laser pointer. Go to 209[/b].
Your breath should become fog at this temperature, but the air is too thin to hold moisture. Go to 208[/b].

214.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north precariously across the narrow path
214.text: You have to think about every step (gain ability 1501[/b]), but you make it safely to cave 034[/b].

214.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east off the steep, icy path
214.text: A staircase leads down to the edge of the sea. Go to 417[/b] and gain 1 morale.

214.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] southwest down a staircase toward a glowing orb
214.text: The sphere grows from the size of a marble to taller than a person as you get closer. Go to 208[/b].

215.text: You leave the metal city toward a structure with entirely different architecture. Go to 216[/b].
The view of the city’s underside is a maze of wires, lights, and metal. Go to 220[/b].

216.text: Passing fragrant flowers and animal remains, you’re amazed at life’s adaptability. Go to 221[/b].
From soft lines to harsh angles, the difference in structures is jarring. Go to 215[/b].

217.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up and over one of the rocky outcroppings that break up the fence
217.text: The fence is relatively easy for you to bypass… but is that a good idea? Go to 222[/b].

218.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south around a fortified location
218.text: Even knowing what the Traveler told you about the stone, it’s hard to leave it behind. Go to 213[/b].

219.text: The icy road is narrow, and the weather only seems to worsen the further you walk. Gain ability 1505[/b] and go to 224[/b].

219.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] southeast toward the salty sea breeze
219.text: An impassable rocky ridge rises directly to the south of here, so you head southeast instead. Go to 417[/b].

219.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] west around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
219.text: While the Traveler distracts the guard, slip around them to 218[/b].

220.text: The slick ice gives you a chance to have fun and see how far you can glide. Go to 601[/b].

220.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south across the frozen turf
220.text: The ice is behind you now, but what looks like a jagged iceberg looms ahead. Go to 215[/b].

221.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the mechanical hydra (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
221.text: You bend and twist to avoid the beast; choose one:

choices.outcome: If this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Gain 1 boost and 1 move[/b] when you notice that the hydra only really cares about guarding the cave.

221.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south past a majestic building
221.text: You leave the steep mountain passes for more civilized environs. Go to 216[/b].

222.text: The snow resting on tree branches reminds you of cozy winter mornings. Go to 223[/b].

222.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north through the deep snow
222.text: The frigid snow field soon yields to a (still frigid) expanse of opaque ice. Gain ability 1496[/b] and go to 603[/b].

222.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up and over one of the rocky outcroppings
222.text: Whatever the barricade was meant for, it’s no match for you. Go to 217[/b].

223.text: The cold doesn’t abate, and snowdrifts hinder your steps. Go to 604[/b].
Despite the frigid temperature, you see signs of abundant wildlife. Go to 222[/b].

224.text: You see hunched shapes through the snow. Go to 605[/b].
You press against the ridge, as far from the sheer drop as you can get. Go to 420[/b].
Following the well-defined path seems to be the safest route. Go to 219[/b].

225.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
225.text: The rocky cliff face offers fewer fingerholds than you’d hoped for, but you eventually make your way down into the slight but noticeable glow of the dense swamp below. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 230[/b].

225.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] south toward a gate in the ridge with blinking red lights
225.text: Choose how to proceed when you reach the gate:

choices.outcome: The gate’s lights turn to green and you walk through. Gain 2 health and go to 195[/b].
A shock ripples through you, causing your muscles to spasm. Lose 2 health and go to 195[/b].
You find a coin on the ground. Gain $1 and continue with a move[/b] action in a different direction.

226.text: Your legs ache from the long descent, but your curiosity about the source of the glimmering helix of light below sustains your motivation. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 231[/b].

226.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south through the mountain pass
226.text: What looks to you like an iridescent maypole has lifted your spirits. Go to 196[/b].

227.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
227.text: Climbing down the sheer cliff leaves your muscles aching, and at the bottom your feet sink slightly into the boggy mud of the swamp. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 232[/b].

228.text: Leaving the tower’s elevated position, the sky is quickly obscured by a forest canopy. Go to 233[/b].
The landscape abruptly changes on the other side of the hill. Go to 198[/b].

229.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
229.text: The slope of the rocky cliff face on the north side of the curiously shaped mountain is unforgiving, but eventually you make your way into a dense swamp punctuated by glowing lights. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 234[/b].

230.text: Sunlight barely penetrates the foliage, so thank goodness for the mysterious lanterns. Go to 235[/b].

You kick off as much muck from your feet as you can and steadily pull yourself up the sheer rock face, only to find an improbably located campsite at the top of the cliff. Go to 225[/b] and gain 1 morale.

231.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the mysterious swamp
231.text: Encountering the gauntlet rattled your thoughts. Go to 236[/b].
Enough handholds in the otherwise sheer rock face make the ascent manageable if tiring. Go to 226[/b] and gain 1 morale.

232.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] or [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the shimmering muck

choices.outcome: Several energy sentients curse you for the disrespect. Gain curse 1395[/b] and go to 237[/b].

Roll 1 challenge die from the pool (if none are available, refresh a die from the center); if the result is 1 time, lose 1 time and place the die in the center (otherwise, refresh the die). Then go to 237[/b].

232.text: The glow of countless lamps in the swamp below helps illuminate the nearly vertical rock wall, and eventually you pull yourself over the grass ledge at the top. Go to 227[/b] and gain 1 morale.

233.text: You don’t want to get lost, but the hazy light up ahead lures you closer. Go to 238[/b].

233.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the cliff-side tower
233.text: Rising above the dense layer of trees feels like coming up for air. Go to 228[/b].

234.text: Unless you’ve been warned to avoid the lily, lose 1 health as the plant smashes against you, leaving welts on your skin. Go north to 239[/b].
The peculiar geometry of the mountain makes an already challenging ascent exhausting. Go to 229[/b] and gain 1 morale.

235.text: The Traveler’s observation about feeling energized keeps your spirits up. Go to 230[/b].

236.text: The metal giving a purple glow is a stark contrast to the wood and yellow ambient light. Go to 241[/b].

237.text: Go to 232[/b] and gain curse 1395[/b] for disrupting a birth.

238.text: Despite that it’s visible from a great distance, the city is silent except for the occasional electrical discharge or clang of a lantern. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 520[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 243[/b].

239.text: The structure above you looks like the best treehouse a child could want. Go to 244[/b].

239.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south through the swamp toward a large flower
239.text: Lose 1 health as the plant smashes against you, leaving welts on your skin. Go south to 234[/b].

240.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the dense trees
240.text: The tree trunks are impressively sturdy to support those chains. Go to 245[/b].

241.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the thick woods
241.text: It looks easy, but you have a feeling not to pass through the opening in the stone. Go to 246[/b].
To avoid getting lost in the swamp, you head for something that doesn’t look like the rest of the trees. Go to 236[/b].

242.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
242.text: Even from the careful distance of your circuitous hike around the monstrous elemental, a sense of creeping discouragement weighs on you. Go to 247[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

243.text: You’re careful not to get stuck in the mud along with the device. Go to 248[/b].
The bright yellow lights of a city belie its eerie silence. Move either into the city (520[/b]) or around the city (238[/b]).

244.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the dense forest
244.text: Look up ahead! Is that a break in the endless trees? Go to 249[/b].

245.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] or [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north through the wetlands

choices.outcome: The reeds sting as you walk past. Lose 1 health and go to 661[/b].
You hop over some inhospitable-looking reeds. Go to 661[/b].

245.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the dense trees
245.text: If those flowers have roots, there must be SOME solid ground to stand on. Go to 240[/b].

246.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north around the pond through the bushes
246.text: The bushes look like a deliberate line, almost a hedge. Go to 662[/b].

246.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the foggy forest
246.text: Visibility decreases rapidly as you head into the trees. Go to 241[/b].

247.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentients (if they are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
247.text: You stay behind the runestones, just in case. Go to 663[/b].

247.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
247.text: As you sneak among the dense thicket of trees, you feel a sense of wilting demoralization that you can’t quite shake. Go to 242[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

248.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the river and beyond
248.text: You admire the flocks of birds high in the sky as you leave the swampy wetland for the pleasant grassland to the north and the forest beyond. Go to 664[/b].

248.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the dark forest
248.text: The pattern on the tree has elements of paint, light, and lichen. Go to 243[/b].

249.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north across the shallow river
249.text: The river looks ideal for irrigation. Go to 665[/b].

249.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the dense forest
249.text: The unadorned tree trunks look plain after the patterns you just left. Go to 244[/b].

250.text: The water looks more appealing than the sand right now. Go to 170[/b].
Of course deserts aren’t always hot; even so, the drop in temperature was bracing. Go to 421[/b].

251.text: Are those… teeth at the center of the indentation? Go to 256[/b].
You ponder tying your gear to one of the floating rocks, to take the weight off your shoulders. Go to 171[/b].

252.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] east toward a treasure chest
252.text: Maybe the desert heat has weakened the chest. Go to 253[/b].
The slow sentient doesn’t attempt to stop you. Go to 257[/b].

252.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the plateau and swim across the water
252.text: It’s out of the frying pan and into the fire: No sooner is the desert at your back than an erupting volcano looms in front of you, and you swim to the south side of the inlet to keep your distance. Go to 172[/b] and gain 1 morale.

253.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south through the warm bay
253.text: You feel more buoyant in this planet’s water than in the oceans at home. Go to 173[/b].

253.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] west toward a large nest
253.text: If those are birds up ahead, they’re like none you’ve ever seen before. Go to 252[/b].

254.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south to a slippery, rocky shoreline
254.text: Your departure adds to the distinct indentations in the red soil. Go to 174[/b].

256.text: The smoking bones aren’t enough warning to deter you from pressing deeper into the heat. Go to 261[/b].

257.text: You still can’t find any shade but maybe the figure can offer another kind of help. Go to 258[/b].

257.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the beasts (if the birds are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
257.text: You’d rather not have any chance of being trapped in this environment. Go to 262[/b].

258.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the peddler (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
258.text: You haven’t seen many animals here, so where did the peddler get so many bones? Go to 263[/b].

258.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] west toward a sentient in trouble
258.text: Unlike the peddler, the sentient ahead looks decidedly out of their element. Go to 257[/b].

259.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east over a gap in the mesa
259.text: The mesa abruptly ends here, but you clear the gap. Go to 444[/b].

260.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
260.text: The 8-armed animal attempts to pull you close, and you barely escape. Go to 265[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

262.text: There must be a way out of this desert! Go to 263[/b].
The bony architecture of the city is magnificent but a little unsettling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 524[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Enter the cave behind the city
choices.outcome: Go to cave 027[/b].
Go to 267[/b].

263.text: An odd noise akin to damp laundry flapping in the wind is getting louder. Go to 268[/b].

263.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west toward a sprawling city
263.text: The lone flower fighting for survival parallels your situation and gives you hope. Go to 262[/b].

264.text: Anyone atop that castle would have a perfect view of the pass you’re walking through. Go to 269[/b].

265.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] until the coast is clear, then move north (if you interacted with the sentients, reduce this cost to 1)
265.text: The path of scraped dirt from the dragged sentient extends as far as you can see. Go to 270[/b].

266.text: The casino seems out of place out here in the desert. Go to 271[/b].

267.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the swift sentient north (if you already interacted with the sentient, reduce this cost to 2)
267.text: Gain 1 health as you pass through the oasis. Go to 272[/b].

267.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south either into or around the city
267.text: The animals whose bones now form the (literal) spine of the city were colossal. Go to city 524[/b] or to a view overlooking the city (262[/b]).

268.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the commotion (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentients are no longer an obstacle)
268.text: You hurry to see if the hills in the distance might offer some shade. Go to 273[/b].

269.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north against the increasing wind
269.text: You’re able to move through the sandstorm to 274[/b], but not before the sand leaves hundreds of shallow gashes in your skin. Lose 1 health.

269.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south toward a towering plateau
269.text: Dust fills the air, even with the tornado behind you. Go to 264[/b].

270.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] east toward an odd configuration of bones
270.text: The bleached white shapes draw most of your attention, but you keep an eye on the giant to the north. Go to 271[/b].

271.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] west in the direction of a cool breeze
271.text: Even a few degrees cooler can make a big difference. Go to 270[/b].

272.text: The shade of the trees cooled you enough to face the heat. Go to 267[/b].

273.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a scuffle (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentients are no longer an obstacle)
273.text: You’re distracted by flashbacks of the crash but are still aware of your surroundings. Go to 268[/b].

274.text: The twister pelts you with sand and pebbles, leaving you with small cuts on your hands and sand caked on your augsuit. Go to 269[/b] and lose 1 health.

275.text: You walk through the sands of the still desert until you come upon a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Go to 280[/b].
Your pace increases as you smell the coast before you see it. Go to 486[/b].

276.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the wall to the north
276.text: It takes time and effort to scale up and down the wall. Go to 281[/b] and gain 1 morale.

276.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] or [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south across a gap
276.text: Your practice pays off: Depending on which type of movement you chose, gain the ability either to balance (1501[/b]) or to leap (1486[/b]), respectively; go to 487[/b].

277.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north under the beast (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
277.text: The animal grabs at you, finding only air where you were seconds before. Go to 282[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

277.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south across the hot sand
277.text: Whatever strung up that insect is not something you want to deal with right now. Go to 488[/b].

278.text: You see no way up that cliff, so you conserve your energy and head the other way. Go to 489[/b].

279.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east down the sheer cliff
279.text: You have to brush the sand away from the handholds on the way down, but you manage the long descent with nothing worse than sore extremities. Go to 462[/b] and gain 1 morale.
As you make your way northward, you think you hear the sentient quietly repeating a sequence of numbers: “4, 8, 15, 16, 23, 42.” Go to 284[/b].

280.text: As you walk toward the base of the towering wall, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly, and you leave to live out an immediate future they already foreseen. Go to 281[/b] and gain 1 morale.

280.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] north up the sheer wall
280.text: As you walk toward the base of the imposing wall, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly, as if they have already foreseen your future. Go to 285[/b] and gain 1 morale.
As you walk into the open desert and toward the towering spires to the south, the elder sand sentient nods knowingly as if they already know your future. Go to 275[/b].

281.text: Past the building is a hole in the rock so precise, it must be a door. Go to 286[/b].
Your descent down the vertical wall into the open sands below is exhausting. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 276[/b].
Your climb down into the dry valley below is exhausting, and at the bottom you find a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 280[/b].

282.text: No matter how tired you are, that beam of light calls you to keep going. Go to 287[/b].

282.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] south past a guardian in a gateway before it sees you (reduce this cost to 1 if the guardian no longer an obstacle)
282.text: The narrow opening makes you feel like the walls are closing in. Go to 277[/b].

283.text: The climb down is so difficult that you don’t think you can return via the same route. Go to 278[/b].

284.text: You stay near the water’s edge, marveling at the erosion patterns. Go to 279[/b].

285.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the desert as the air begins to chill
285.text: You crest one sandy dune, and then another, and another. Go to 290[/b].

285.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the sheer wall
285.text: Your climb down the cliff to the sands below is tiring, and at the bottom you find a sand sentient who seems to have been expecting you. Go to 280[/b] and gain 1 morale.

286.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the multi-headed sentient as the sun lowers in the sky (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
286.text: The sentient is too busy debating something untranslatable with itself to notice you slipping behind a rock outcrop. Go to 291[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The sentient’s debate has exhausted you before you even start walking. Go to 281[/b].

287.text: Circumnavigating the Memory Palace provides an opportunity to reflect on your most cherished memories. Go to 292[/b].
The pillar of light behind you is bright enough to cast a shadow. Go to 282[/b].

288.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the gateway to the north
288.text: As you walk through the opening, you feel a tripwire at your feet, and a boulder smashes into your shoulders. Lose 1 health and crawl forward to 293[/b].

289.text: You take a running start and leap off the bridge to the other side. Go to 294[/b] and gain 1 morale.

290.text: You leave the skull behind and head for something much less natural in the ground ahead. Go to 285[/b].

291.text: As you walk past the pit, the sand under your feet gives way and a massive centipede bursts upward. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to 296[/b].
Go to cave 049[/b].

292.text: Even in a world this unfamiliar, the skull and crossbones needs no translation. Go to 297[/b].
The steep mountain presents two options. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 287[/b].

After a long, vertical hike, you reach an entrance near the top. Lose 1 time. First, view page 38 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost as you look down at the world below. Then go to interior 592[/b] and gain 1 morale.

293.text: Passing the fresh water source, you wonder if something is keeping animals away. Go to 297[/b].
As you pass the spring—which is far too small for you to enter—the water carries the sounds of a crowd cheering. Go to 298[/b].

294.text: The artificial red lights in the distance aren’t nearly as comforting as the firelight you left. Go to 299[/b].
Suppressing a self-preservation instinct, you sprint into a long jump, barely clearing the gap below. Go to 289[/b] and gain 1 morale.

295.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the sentient and their assistant (if they are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
295.text: The sentient and their insectile aide are preoccupied with their careful glasswork. Go to 325[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

296.text: Are the stones actually making noise, or are you just sensing vibrations through your skin? Go to 326[/b].

296.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south across the desert toward a spiky pit
296.text: As you walk past the pit, the sand under your feet gives way and a massive centipede bursts upward. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go south to 291[/b].
Go to cave 049[/b].

297.text: Daylight should give some relief from the chill of night. Go to 327[/b].
You cover as much of your skin as possible and hope the exertion warms you up. Go to 292[/b].

298.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north out of the desert
298.text: The air grows warmer as dawn breaks. Go to 328[/b].
Attempts to ride a lorestone down the cliff don’t go as planned. Go to 293[/b].

299.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north up to a mesa
299.text: The sky brightens as you trek north. Go to 329[/b].

300.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the wild animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
300.text: The stone bridge provides some overhead protection. Go to 305[/b].
You leave the animal’s territory before others arrive. Go to 370[/b].

301.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north down the hill and around the circle of sentients
301.text: You do your best not to disrupt any activity at the henge-like site. Go to 306[/b].
Something stings you as you go to 371[/b]; lose 1 health.

302.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the mountain toward the sea
302.text: The trail is steep and leads to a view of several immense birdhouses. Go to 307[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Lose 1 health as the sharp fangs of a large fish tear at your leg; go to 372[/b].

303.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north off the cliff or [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the cliff into the sea

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 look[/b] to avoid a painful belly flop onto the water’s surface. Go to 308[/b].
Carefully (and a little awkwardly) you clamber down the rocky cliff face. Go to 308[/b].

303.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward some rolling hills
303.text: The elevated peninsula is too exposed for your liking. Go to 373[/b].

304.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east across the gap to another sky island
304.text: The ocean far below is turbulent, and with a running start you manage to clear the gap. Go to 404[/b] and gain 1 morale.

304.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north off the skybound islands into the sea below, or increase the cost to 6 to [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the cliff to the water’s edge

choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Then lose 1 health unless you pay 1 look[/b] to avoid cracking your knee on a stone on the way down. Go to 309[/b].
You descend cautiously down the cliff face to the water below. Go to 309[/b] and gain 1 morale.

305.text: As you turn the corner beyond the lighthouse, the rainbow comes into full view. Go to 310[/b].

306.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north toward a distant shoreline
306.text: It’s unnerving to swim below the massive hovering stones. Go to 311[/b].
Purple energy seems to infuse the stones and even the air in this part of the world. Go to 301[/b].

307.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north from the island to the distant shore
307.text: Could that titanic animal have produced offspring? You try not to think about it as you swim. Go to 312[/b].
With a swift start you set off around the mountain, and several colossal birdhouses come into view. Go to 302[/b] and gain 1 morale.

308.text: The long journey across the wide open waters leaves your muscles tired, but eventually you swim up to a palm-shaded beach. Go to 313[/b] and gain 1 morale.

308.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the steep, windblown cliff
308.text: The overhang at the top of the precipice pushes your climbing skills to their limit, but you finally pull yourself over the ledge next to some curious stones. Go to 303[/b] and gain 1 morale.

309.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north underwater as far as possible to avoid detection (if the pirates are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
309.text: Your lungs burn but the pirates above are otherwise occupied and don’t notice you. Go to 314[/b].

309.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up to a sky island
309.text: The force of the salty wind makes the already challenging climb nearly impossible, but you eventually manage to pull yourself over the ledge of the floating island. Gain ability 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to 304[/b].

310.text: Passing directly through the end of the rainbow gives a split second of unnatural wisdom. Gain 1 boost and go to 315[/b].
Maybe it’s your imagination, but this beach has grains of sand in a rainbow of colors. Go to 305[/b].

311.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south toward an island surrounded by floating stones
311.text: The shoreline path extends below you on the seabed. Go to 306[/b].

312.text: The island has a distinctive silhouette, one that makes you uneasy. Go to 307[/b].

313.action: [b][MOVE] CHASE[/b] away the animal as you wade north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
313.text: You make yourself big, spooking the animal. Gain 1 morale and go north to 318[/b].
The long swim across the sea exhausts you, but you eventually find your way to another palm-lined shore. Go to 308[/b], and gain 1 morale and 1 move[/b].
No wonder that bay had so many birds. The current makes it hard to leave! Go to 312[/b].

314.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] over to the shore and proceed over the hill
314.text: When you reach the shore, you have an uneasy feeling as you pass the hole in the hill. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 037[/b].

choices.option: Walk around the hill to the right
choices.outcome: Go to location 319[/b].

314.text: A hovering vehicle casts a shadow over you during the swim. Go to 309[/b].
The water is shallow enough to stand up and take occasional breaks. Go to 313[/b].

315.text: You’re so enthralled by the color of the flowers you don’t notice the color in the sky. Go to 310[/b].

315.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] west deeper into the forest
315.text: With the newfound knowledge from the book, you look at your surroundings more closely. Go to 385[/b].

317.text: That animal looked so much like a plant that you’re on high alert as you pass through the “trees.” Go to 316[/b].

318.text: This river could have cultural or commercial significance to the local inhabitants. Go to 313[/b].

319.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the distracted animal
319.text: Biologists would love to study this animal-created art. Go to 324[/b].

321.text: The scholarly atmosphere of the building is enhanced by a meditative valley. Go to 707[/b].

322.text: The delicacy with which the sentient handled the flowers showed true reverence. Go to 713[/b].

323.text: Hands-on experience might teach you more than a classroom. Go to 324[/b].
You are careful not to disrupt the lesson. Go to 719[/b].

324.text: A calm but consistent voice grows louder. Go to 323[/b].

325.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north through the golden webs
325.text: You make yourself as small as possible, so you don’t get caught too. Go to 330[/b].

326.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east over the gap in the ground
326.text: The hot liquid falls into the chasm below. Go to 327[/b].

326.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over the scalding stream
326.text: An errant drop burns a mark into your gear. Go to 331[/b].
There is a chill in the air as day turns to night. Go to 296[/b].

327.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north along the winding path to the spire
327.text: The lights along the sides of the path make it easy to find the best route. Go to 332[/b].
The sky grows dark as you head south. Go to 297[/b].
You pull up short on the other side, narrowly avoiding a long fall. Go to 326[/b].

328.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the slow sentient
328.text: The sentient makes a feeble attempt to catch you, but you easily evade them. As you do, you’re drawn to the sweet smell of the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. Go north to 333[/b].
Stars appear in the sky as you trudge south. Go to 298[/b].

329.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north, where the canyonland gives way to grassier terrain
329.text: The grass is literally greener on the other side. Go to 334[/b].
The sky grows dark as you journey south. Go to 299[/b].

331.text: One day the fissure will likely be a rift valley, but for now it’s just narrow enough to clear with a running start. Go to 336[/b] and gain 1 morale.

331.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south over the scalding stream
331.text: The current of hot air is rising from the roiling liquid below. Go to 326[/b].

332.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the top of the spire
332.text: The noisy village is well-shaded from the afternoon sun. Choose one:

choices.option: Enter the city through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city 530[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Take a move--DESCEND action north toward the valley
choices.outcome: The descent down the spire takes quite a bit of effort, and you’re exhausted when you reach the bottom. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 337[/b].

332.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south along the narrow path
332.text: Bracing against the wind, you make your way south. Go to 327[/b].

333.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north into the valley using the ladder attached to the shop
333.text: A cacophony of sound drifts up from below. Go north to 338[/b].

334.text: The golden liquid has made the grass slippery. Go to 339[/b].

334.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south as the grass turns to canyonland
334.text: Patches of rock and rifts in the earth appear more often here. Go to 329[/b].

335.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the extremely steep cliff
335.text: You slowly descend the sheer face of the cliff to the river valley below and make your way to gently lapping waves of the nearby shoreline. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 340[/b].

336.text: As you land on your feet, several sentients in the caravan applaud the impressive jump. They were planning to stop soon for a break, and they invite you as the guest of honor at a campfire feast, where they share stories about collecting and selling husks to other gold sentients. Gain 1 morale, 1 health, and 1 boost. The caravan moves on, leaving you on 341[/b].
The fissure is wide enough that you need a running start to leap across it. Go to 331[/b] and gain 1 morale.

337.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north across the rope bridge
337.text: The old ropes and slats sway back and forth beneath you. Go to 342[/b].

337.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the steep spire
337.text: After a long, windy climb, you find yourself in a back alley of an isolated village. Gain 1 morale and go to city 530[/b].

338.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north around the resort to the shore
338.text: The view of the resort reminds you of the all-inclusive luxury hotels back home. Go to 343[/b].

338.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the plateau using a ladder dangling from the edge
338.text: The ladder is a big help! Does someone want you to go this way? Go to 333[/b].

339.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the boisterous game
339.text: Luck is with you, as you bypass the commotion unscathed. Go to 344[/b].
You decide to head for calmer surroundings. Go to 334[/b].

340.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north through the muddy tidepool
340.text: Your legs sink into the mud as you wade north. Go to 504[/b].

340.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] a long, steep cliff to the south
340.text: After walking upstream through a river valley, the vertical face of the rock cliff towers high above you. You slowly, but steadily, ascend to the top. Gain ability 1468[/b] and 1 morale; go to 335[/b].

341.text: Far from the trial site you find a canyon that you can barely clear with a running start. Go to 336[/b] and gain 1 morale.

342.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north through the city canals
342.text: The polished gold of the geometric city glimmers on the calm water. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 529[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 506[/b].

342.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] south across a rope bridge
342.text: The reflected glow of the city warms the landscape around you. Go to 337[/b].

343.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] across the canal to the north shore
343.text: The water tastes slightly brackish. Go to 507[/b].
The shade from above is provided by a massive floating structure. Go to 338[/b] for a better view.

344.text: The cityscape fades quickly, replaced by a more natural setting. Go to 470[/b].

344.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north across the murky canal
344.text: You go right past where the city should be and find yourself on a shallow beach. Go to 508[/b].

344.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] south around a boisterous game
344.text: You can’t decipher the rules of the game, but you’re still fascinated. Go to 339[/b].

345.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] south up a city wall
345.text: The sights and sounds of a sprawling city greet you on the other side of the wall. Go to 766[/b].
The water near the shore is calm, but you quickly find yourself struggling against the tide. Go to 461[/b].

346.text: The bay narrows near the end of your swim as you enter a busy city. Go to 772[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Heading into the wind and the current feels like the world is against you. Go to 345[/b].

347.text: When you approach the shaded hill in the distance, the sand centipede perched on top of the hill crashes down on you. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Then choose one:

choices.outcome: Go north to 177[/b].
Go to cave 049[/b].

347.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] south over the city wall
347.text: Your ascent south leads into the heart of a vast city. Go to 778[/b].

348.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the city wall to the south
348.text: On the other side of the wall is an ancient city. Go to 784[/b].

349.text: Even wilted, the flower had a graceful beauty. You hope to see more of them. Go to 179[/b].

349.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] the city wall to the south
349.text: Beyond the wall you find a sprawling city. Go to 790[/b].

350.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south through a shallow pond
350.text: Turning your back on the cave makes you a little uncomfortable. Go to 491[/b].

351.text: The tower you pass is metal, but it feels like a natural part of the landscape. Go to 370[/b].

351.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south up a hillside covered in slushy snow
351.text: As soon as the elevation rises, the green surroundings are covered by white. Go to 492[/b].

352.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from rock to rock
352.text: You never thought your hopscotch skills would prove useful later in life! Go to 371[/b].
The melting snow must flow into the river you just left. Go to 493[/b].

353.text: With the river on your left, you’re cognizant of the avalanche potential from your right. Go to 354[/b].
The mud of the riverbank soon gives way to the snow of the mountainside. Go to 494[/b].

354.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up the steep, snow-crested mountainside
354.text: The walk is taxing, but the effort is worth the spectacular view of the verdant terrain below. Go to 495[/b] and gain 1 morale.

354.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] west to a curve in the river
354.text: If the water is mostly melted snow, it would be very cold to wade through. Go to 353[/b].

355.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south across the wetlands and up a hill
355.text: The ruined section behind you contained life support systems; the irony isn’t lost on you. Go to 496[/b].

356.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north toward the cove on the right
356.text: Choose one based on previous actions:

choices.option: The sea centipede is no longer an obstacle
choices.outcome: Go to 375[/b] and gain 2 move[/b].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you pay 1 look
choices.outcome: You notice the gaping mouth in the water and swim around it to 375[/b].

choices.option: You haven’t neutralized the sea centipede and you don’t pay 1 look
choices.outcome: The beast swallows you (lose 1 health) and spits you out in cave 046[/b].

356.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south toward a seaside warehouse
356.text: The warehouse reminds you of the unassuming canneries in the port town your parents retired to. Either swim into the warehouse (interior 578[/b]) or past it (location 497[/b]).

357.text: This building won’t last long, and you can help more elsewhere. Go to 376[/b].

357.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south around a monstrous elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
357.text: The narrow canyon leaves little room for sneaking as you avoid the hulking elemental’s attention, and the tremors of its footsteps knock you off balance more than once. Go to 498[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

358.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the sentient (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentient is no longer an obstacle)
358.text: The rocky islands have plenty of overhangs that keep you out of sight. Go to 377[/b].
Glowing windows set asymmetrically into stone pillars leer down at you. Go to 499[/b].

359.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] east over the choppy tide
