606.text: You careen over the icy slope and down a snowy embankment. Go to 601[/b].

607.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all overpower[/b] results. Underfoot of the animals, you lose 1 health unless you pay 1 overpower[/b] or unless you previously removed the threat of the animals. Go to 612[/b].
You slide wildly across a frozen lake but your fear subsumes your exhilaration as you notice the wide cracks in the ice. Go to 602[/b].

608.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north across the vast expanse of ice
608.text: You fear for bumps, bruises, and breaks every time you fall on the ice. Go to 613[/b].

609.text: Using the snow for traction you accelerate yourself to a breakneck speed. It’s not safe or comfortable, but at least it’s fun. Go to 613[/b].

609.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the steep hill
609.text: Your breath catches in your lungs as you reach the summit. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
It’s a smooth ride down into the open plain, and you spot something smoking in the distance ahead. Go to 604[/b].

610.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the animal as you make your way north (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
610.text: You dart forward through the snowfall, finding cover in a small canyon. Go to 615[/b].

611.action: [b][MOVE] SLIDE[/b] north over the ice, avoiding the cracks
611.text: The ice tilts toward a series of gaps, and falling into them could be deadly. Fortunately you manage to avoid them as you slide north. Go to 616[/b].

611.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down a small, icy hill
611.text: You find yourself behind a sentient, their back to you. They seem to be guarding a cave entrance. You can choose to go to cave 021[/b] or to face the sentient (go to location 606[/b]).

612.text: You pass tall, cabled towers that remind you of the server racks on your spaceship. Go to 607[/b].

613.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east up the steep mountain
613.text: From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The ice turning to snow is a sign of warmer climates to the north. Go to 618[/b].
The cold doesn’t subside, but at least the fast slide across the nearly frictionless ice is fun. Go to 608[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the east from the mountaintop
614.text: The steep descent into the icy canyon below is cold and technically demanding. Go east to 615[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the south from the mountaintop
614.text: The sun hangs tentatively in the sky, seeming powerless to melt the frozen lake below. Go south to 609[/b].

614.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] to the west from the mountaintop
614.text: The temperature doesn’t become any more forgiving as you clamber down the icy mountainside to the towering, cabled structures below. Go west to 613[/b].

615.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] east through a gateway illuminated by green lights
615.text: Unless you’ve disarmed the gateway, you receive a brutal shock as you pass through it. Lose 1 health and go to 422[/b].

615.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] west up a steep mountain
615.text: From the top of the mountain, the clouds briefly part to reveal the snowy area below. View page 32 in the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost. Then go to 614[/b] and gain 1 morale.

616.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
616.text: By staying close to the cliffside you manage to avoid the attention of the nightmarish synthetic elemental’s many tentacles. Go to 621[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
Against your better judgment, you careen down an icy hill and across a frozen lake. Go to 611[/b].

617.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north over the icy crags
617.text: After focusing on the frozen, spiky stones, you look up to see a sentient glaring at you. Go to 622[/b].

618.text: It’s still freezing, but you’re happy to find yourself more in the open (and with fewer enormous and frankly weird chattering masks). Go to 613[/b].

619.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the busy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
619.text: You are reluctant to leave the warmth of the sentient as you sneak north. Go to 624[/b].
You slide across the slippery ice and skid to a stop in a wide, shallow cave. Go to 618[/b].

620.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east over the mountain range
620.text: The crisp snow starts to turn to mush as you hike east. Go to 423[/b] and gain 1 morale.
To avoid electrocution, you wiggle carefully through the wires. Go to 625[/b].

621.text: The maze piques your curiosity, but it’s much easier to simply walk around it. Go to 626[/b].

621.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past the hydra-like elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
621.text: You hug the snowy cliff face as you move south and manage to avoid the attention of the elemental’s numerous appendages. Go to 616[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The air warms quickly as you scale down the far side of the wall. Go to 402[/b].

622.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
622.text: You scamper across the snow toward the city lights in the distance. Go to 627[/b].

623.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the hologram while the Traveler provides a distraction (if you talked to the hologram, reduce this cost to 1)
623.text: The panoptic holographic AI sees your attempts to sneak by it, and as you leave, it offers haughtily, “I could calculate your chance of survival, but you won’t like it.” Go to 628[/b].

624.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north blindly through the wires
624.text: You need a little luck to make it through the wires. Roll 3 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as you trip on a cord and bang your knee unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go north to 629[/b].

624.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] northeast out into the open
624.text: You avoid the tangle of wires and head northeast, where a vehicle hovers over the Traveler. Go to 630[/b].

625.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] east over the mountain range
625.text: Warm air from the east motivates you to persist east across the mountain range. Go to 424[/b] and gain 1 morale.

626.text: The building features ample handholds and footholds, though you’re careful not to slice yourself on the sharp metal. Go to 492[/b].

626.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south around the outskirts of a maze, scouting it as much as possible
626.text: You catch occasional glimpses of the maze as you walk, giving you a slight advantage if you decide to journey through it later. Gain 1 boost and 1 look[/b]; go to 621[/b].

626.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] a fence to head west
626.text: A jolt of electricity strikes as you grab the top of the fence (unless you previously disarmed the fence, suffer 1 heat damage). Go to 403[/b].

627.text: You stay clear of the dozens of cables draping outward from the city center and dash to the frozen wastes to the east. Go to 628[/b].

627.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north across the icy cables
627.text: You figure there must be an easier way to enter the city, but you haven’t seen one yet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 521[/b], gain 1 random skill, and gain 1 morale.
Go to 493[/b] and gain 1 morale.

627.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past an angry-looking sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
627.text: An intimidating sentient has their back turned to you. Either confront them (go to 622[/b]) or go southeast to 623[/b] or southwest to 621[/b].

628.text: The land drops off just beyond the crystals, leading down toward fields of green. Go to 494[/b].

629.text: You dodge through tentacles swinging like huge, slow pendulums around you. Go to 495[/b].

630.text: After cresting the hill, the temperature rises rapidly to something more comfortable, and the snow gives way to sand. Go to 425[/b].

631.text: You push away from the seaweed to a place where you can stand out of the water. Go to 363[/b].
Your lungs plead for fresh air as you head for the surface. Go to 381[/b].

632.text: You swim against the current to stay clear of the dangerous flora. Go to 638[/b].

632.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] north through the swinging stalks
632.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go to 633[/b].
You’re eager to escape from the violent flora. Go to 426[/b].

633.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] south through the aggressive vegetation
633.text: Roll 5 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Lose 1 health as the plants slash toward you unless you pay 1 look[/b]. Go to 632[/b].
Bubbles released by the fish push you toward the shallows. Go to 427[/b].

634.text: As intriguing and mysteriously well-lit as the depths appear, you are eager for a breath of fresh air. Go to 428[/b].

635.text: The bioluminescent roots help to guide you toward the shallows. Go to 429[/b].

636.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, struggling against the twisters

choices.outcome: Go north to 476[/b] and gain 1 morale.

You are caught in the second sea spout, which sends you rocketing out of the water. Roll a skill die and go to a location based on the result: move[/b] (476[/b]); look[/b] (361[/b]); engage[/b] (667[/b]); help[/b] (434[/b]); take[/b] (649[/b]); overpower[/b] (752[/b]).

637.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north as seaweed slaps into you
637.text: Tendrils of seaweed wrap around your appendages, some leaving painful welts as you pull away. Go to 638[/b] and lose 1 health.
As you emerge from the ocean, the breeze skimming along the water warns you of a storm to the east. Go to 364[/b].

638.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south through the whipping seaweed
638.text: Any piece of seaweed that comes into contact with your skin leaves you with open sores. Go to 637[/b] and lose 1 health.

638.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west as the giant seaweed waves around you
638.text: Countless bioluminescent tendrils light your way. Go to 632[/b].

639.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north through the dense cables
639.text: The thick cables sway in the current as you swim by. Go to 640[/b].

640.text: A guard stops you and asks for identification. If you have the water emblem, go to 641[/b]. If not, stay here, gain 1 boost, and continue.

640.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] south through the dense cables
640.text: You manage to pull yourself through the heavy cables undulating slowly in the current. Go to 639[/b].

641.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north, admiring the city below
641.text: The city glows with the bioluminescence of a million organisms. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a less populated area to enter the ocean metropolis. Go to city 528[/b].
Go to 642[/b].

642.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the animal to the surface (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
642.text: The beast is massive, but it’s also quite slow. Go to 477[/b].

642.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south into or around an underwater city
642.text: You swim deeper into the ocean, the pressure building in your ears. Go either to city 528[/b] or to 641[/b].

643.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north deeper into the ocean
643.text: You underestimated the strength of the waterspout. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Then choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 644[/b].

choices.option: Leave yourself at the whim of the waterspout
choices.outcome: Lose 1 health and go to 512[/b].

643.text: The closer you swim to the shallows in this area, the more you are at the whim of the tide. Go to 365[/b].

644.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south around the water spout
644.text: To avoid being dragged to the sea floor, you give the vortex a wide berth. Go to 643[/b].

645.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
645.text: The sentient, impressed by your strength, lets you pass. Go to 646[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

646.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north past the sentient, bowing respectfully
646.text: In appreciation, the creature cushions your head in a bubble. Ignore the hypoxia damage when you arrive at 647[/b].

648.text: Catching your scent, a pair of sharks chases after you. Roll 2 skill dice; if the results include at least 1 move[/b] or 1 overpower[/b], go north to 478[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and go to an adjacent listed location.

649.text: You’re unsure of the dangers that lurk around or inside the shipwreck, so you head to the shallows. Go to 366[/b].

650.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the weakened sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
650.text: You dart smoothly through the water, only to come face to face with several angry animals. Go to 651[/b].

651.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the herd of animals (if the animals are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
651.text: You swim past several large egg-like containers hidden on the ocean floor. Go to 652[/b].

652.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the remaining guards
652.text: You grow still and calm your heartbeat, drifting above guards. Go to 653[/b].

653.text: You swim quietly over several guards without catching their attention. Go to 652[/b].

654.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] north through the seemingly endless colony of anemones
654.text: Roll 2 skill dice. For each engage[/b] and overpower[/b] result, suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. Then go to 479[/b].

655.text: Fresh air fills your lungs when you reach the shallows. Go to 448[/b].
You gulp for air as you break through to the surface. Go to 367[/b].

656.text: These dark ocean depths give you the creeps. Go to 449[/b].

657.text: Underwater monsters have a huge advantage over you in their natural environment; you didn’t even learn to swim until recently. Go to 450[/b].

657.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
657.text: You swim behind rock formations and the bubbles rising from glowing vents and manage not to draw the hulking sea monster’s attention. Go to 658[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

658.text: You swim away from these dark waters, cresting the ocean surface. Go to 451[/b].

658.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south around a massive elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
658.text: You can only be so subtle moving around in the water, but to your relief the gargantuan creature either doesn’t notice or doesn’t take interest in you. Go to 657[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

659.text: The graveyard may be a sacred place to the water sentients, but it chills you to the bone. Go to 452[/b].
The gravekeeper offers you safe passage. Go to 660[/b].

660.text: You were once stung by a jellyfish, and you discovered soon after that it’s a myth that urinating on such a sting will alleviate the pain. You swim east away from them. Go to 453[/b].
The sunbeams guide you toward the surface. Go to 480[/b].

661.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north over the rushing water
661.text: You pass by the vehicle on your way north. Choose one:

choices.option: Hijack the vehicle (if available; pay 1 take)
choices.outcome: You take the opportunity to grab the reins and steer it as you wish. Gain vehicle 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it, then go to 666[/b].

choices.option: Ignore the vehicle (or if it is not available)
choices.outcome: Go to 666[/b].

661.text: The lush hills turn into an eerie, soggy marsh the farther south you reach. Go to 245[/b].
The ocean floor drops just a few meters from the shore, enough that you can’t see the bottom. Go to 368[/b].

662.text: A bright light under the waterfall beckons to you as you head north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to cave 028[/b].
Go to 667[/b].

662.text: You can feel the humidity increase when you reach the marsh. Go to 246[/b].

663.text: Bat-like animals dart in long flocks through the sky as you quietly wade around some sentients talking in a river. Go to 247[/b].

664.text: The river is deep, and the bottom becomes muckier as you cross it. Go to 248[/b].

665.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north through the long grass
665.text: The grass is so thick that you can’t see anything below your waist. Go to 670[/b].

665.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south across a narrow river
665.text: The river bottom is especially mucky, but otherwise the wade is pleasant. Go to 249[/b].

666.text: A bridge across the stream is occupied, so you wade quietly through the water instead. Go to 667[/b].

666.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] south off the waterfall onto the soft grass below
666.text: You tuck into a roll expertly as you land, but the turtle-like creature nearby seems unimpressed. Go to 661[/b].
This babbling brook leads into a vast ocean at the forest edge. Go to 448[/b].

667.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
667.text: You quietly observe the ceremony as you head north. Gain 1 boost and go to 672[/b].
You crash through the trees and bushes into a clearing. Go to 662[/b].
With respect to the celebrants, you try to splash as little as possible. Go to 666[/b].

668.text: The forest is so dense that you can’t see farther than a few paces ahead. Go to 673[/b].

669.text: You climb over mossy fallen logs and cut hanging vines as you push northward. Go to 674[/b].

670.text: The grove leads into a vast, hilly forest. Go to 675[/b].

670.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] south through the long grass
670.text: The field slopes slightly downward as you stroll to the south. Go to 665[/b].

671.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west into the shallows of a sea
671.text: The water is cool and refreshing, but you can’t shake the sense that you’re being watched. Go to 449[/b].

672.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: You walk silently through the lush grass toward a towering city in the distance. Go to 677[/b].

672.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a ceremony (if you already interacted with the ceremony, reduce this cost to 1)
672.text: There is love in the air as you head south through the forest. Go to 667[/b].

673.text: The grassy path is well maintained; it’s much more difficult to traverse through the thicket. Go to 678[/b].
Overgrown fallen trees are everywhere, their limbs akimbo, and it’s real exercise to climb over all of them. Go to 668[/b].

674.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north into the dense forest
674.text: Berries squish under your toes as you blaze past the path left by the animal. Go to 679[/b].

674.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the forest into a field
674.text: It takes a moment for your eyes to adjust to the bright light of the sun in the open pasture, and when they do you notice red fungi stretching across it. Go to 669[/b].

675.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the thick underbrush
675.text: A trick of the light makes the animal in the distance appear ethereal. Go to 680[/b].

675.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the forest into a meadow
675.text: As you emerge from the shadows of the forest, a glowing glyph hovers curiously above a stone. Go to 670[/b].

676.text: You peek inside the building as you walk past, catching sight of a book, a key, a knife, and a crystal. Go to 681[/b].
You step down the leafy embankment and walk out into the cool water until it comes up to your waist. Go to 450[/b].

677.text: Tendrils of smoke trace up the long trunk of the massive tree-city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 519[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 682[/b].

678.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the grove
678.text: The forest is alive with gentle bird calls, quietly chatting sentients, and the occasional howl. Go to 673[/b].

679.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north past the fungal animal (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
679.text: The animal shoves you, and within seconds you’re surrounded by dozens of similar creatures. You must immediately choose either to engage[/b] them or to overpower[/b] them:

choices.outcome: You belt out a few lines of your favorite song, and, to your delight, the fungi sway side to side in unison. They hum along as they allow you to proceed north, led by a youngling. Gain animal 843[/b] and go north to 684[/b].
You carve a path through the wretched beasts, sparing none. Gain item 1162[/b] and 1 overpower[/b]; you may go north to 684[/b].

679.text: You push aside through the climbers and step over mossy logs and into a small glade. Go to 674[/b].

680.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south through the thick underbrush
680.text: You cut through the bushes to reach a colorful tree. Go to 675[/b].

681.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] north via the left-side path
681.text: If you already removed the threat of the hidden creature on this location, go north to 686[/b]. Otherwise, as you pass through the trees, a great weight drops on you from above, sharp fangs digging into your neck (lose 1 health). You roll away to see your attacker, a large spider-like creature with teeth like a vampire. It poises to strike again. Choose how to respond:

choices.option: move--DIVE west into the sea with great haste
choices.outcome: The beast doesn’t follow you into the water. Go to 451[/b].
It’s a brutal battle, but you emerge victorious. Gain item 1164[/b] and go north to 686[/b].

681.text: The canopy is thick enough that little sun reaches the ground. Go to 676[/b].
The forest ends abruptly at the edge of a vast ocean. Go to 451[/b].

682.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east out of the trees
682.text: You clamber down branches from the canopy to the understory, where strange pendulous structures hang from the sturdy branches above you. Go to 683[/b].

682.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north, ascending into the trees
682.text: The forest is too thick for easy traversal, but the residents have created alternative options for navigating the canopy. Go to 687[/b].

682.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south into or around a city
682.text: The city smells of rich mahogany. Choose one:

choices.outcome: A bowl of worms props open the door to a shop. If you enter, read the result of 519[/b] in the look[/b] storybook, then go to city 519[/b]. Otherwise, go to city 519[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 677[/b].

683.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north up the stairs to the right
683.text: The staircase takes you higher into the trees, the type of place any curious animal would love to perch. Go to 688[/b].

683.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west higher into the trees
683.text: As you move west you scale branches upward toward the canopy. Go to 682[/b].

684.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north up the stairs around the winged animals
684.text: Roll 4 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 look (or if you have already dealt with the threat of the beetle)
choices.outcome: Go to 689[/b].
You fail to notice the hidden beetle on the left-side tree, waiting patiently for unsuspecting prey; you feel a sharp sting and tumble off the staircase (lose 1 health and go east to 685[/b]).

685.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] north through the tangle of vines
685.text: You navigate through the thick snarls of vines to find yourself in front of some not-quite-ruins. Gain ability 1484[/b] and go to 690[/b].

686.text: The undergrowth is too dense for traveling on foot, so you ascend a tree instead. Go to 687[/b].
Branches catch your augsuit as you blaze a path north. Go to 691[/b].
The transition from forest to seaside is abrupt. Go to 452[/b].

687.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north to the forest floor
687.text: You’re getting a little nervous about being up so high, so you carefully head toward solid ground. Go to 692[/b].

687.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south to the base of the tree
687.text: The climb from the emergent layer down to the glow in the canopy below isn’t so far, but it’s difficult not to dwell on how far about the forest floor you are. Go to 682[/b].

687.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] west, swinging from one branch to the next
687.text: The first swing is perilous, but you feel like an acrobat in flow for those that follow, moving seamlessly from branch to branch. Go to 686[/b].

688.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the tree trunks toward the base of a massive tree
688.text: The irregular branches make the climb down a tricky one, but you’re charmed by the wak-wak calls of the birds in the trees. Go to 693[/b].
As you swing on the vine, you bellow out the victory cry of the bull ape, but after you land on a branch, you’re slightly embarrassed and hope no one heard you. Go to 683[/b].

689.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east from the canopy toward an ancient gateway
689.text: You clamber down the branches of trees to find a mostly functional gateway. Go to 690[/b].

689.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north from the canopy to the edge of the forest
689.text: You clamber down the towering trees to the forest floor and the impressive ruins below. Go to 694[/b].

690.text: The forest quickly becomes a snarl of tall trees and long vines. Gain ability 1484[/b] and go to 685[/b].

690.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] west up into the trees
690.text: You pull yourself up from branch to branch until you reach the canopy, high above the arched gateway below. Go to 689[/b].

691.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north around the tangle of roots
691.text: The roots are so plentiful that you almost twist your ankle. Go north to 696[/b].
The thick vines you hack away appear to indicate that this part of the forest isn’t well-traveled. Go to 686[/b].
The seawater flows right up to the forest edge. Go to 453[/b].

692.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north through the animal’s giant legs as it stomps forward (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
692.text: You weave between the animal’s legs, barely avoiding its massive tail. Go to 697[/b].

692.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up the tall trees
692.text: The climb to the canopy is challenging, but you’re soothed by the gentle nuu-nuu calls of the birds in the forest. Go to 687[/b].

693.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north around the massive trunk
693.text: In all the worlds you’ve visited, this is by far the largest tree you’ve ever seen. The trunk is speckled with climbers wearing a variety of colorful outfits, along with tags indicating routes and dangerous areas. Go to 698[/b].

693.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south up into the canopy
693.text: The long climb up the tall trees reveals a tower just to the north. Go to 688[/b].

694.text: You trek around the ancient ruins to a grassy cliffside. Go to 699[/b].
As you near the canopy, you hear… meowing? Go to 689[/b].

695.text: An open plain lies just north of you, but the shortest path between two points is a straight line, and you clear branches and vines from that line with gusto. Go to 386[/b].
You follow the path up to the farmhouse before taking to the bushes to avoid bothering the occupants. Go to 700[/b].

696.text: You hike through the idyllic valley, the silhouette of the city looming in front of you. Go to 761[/b].

696.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south around a large wooden monument
696.text: As you walk around the monument, you realize that it’s a vast series of tree roots woven together. Go to 691[/b].
You step into the gentle waves of an impossibly blue sea. Go to 454[/b].

697.text: You hike through the misty forest to the towers of the city to the north. Go to 767[/b].

698.text: The gold and green fields here are tranquil, even Elysian, but you press onward. Go to 699[/b].

698.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north over fields and hills
698.text: You walk through several patches of fog sitting in the small valleys between you and the towering city. Go to 773[/b].

699.text: You give a celebratory high five to the levitating device. Gain 2 help[/b] and go to 779[/b].
The towering ruins stand like a sentient over the serene valley. Go to 694[/b].
With a running jump you cross to the wide-open pastures to the west. Go to 698[/b].

700.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the path north across the rolling hills toward a sprawling city
700.text: The path leads to the outskirts of a city. Go to 785[/b].
You stroll over the rolling countryside to a farm building that looks well maintained. Go to 695[/b].

701.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north over the rolling hills
701.text: You steer clear of the glowing box, instead hiking up the steep, grassy incline to the north. Go to 702[/b].

701.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] west toward a herd of animals
701.text: A distant herd grazes on the abundant grass; they take no notice of you. Go to 387[/b].

702.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up and down the steep hills
702.text: From a distance it seems that an orb is glowing to the north, but as you draw close, you realize it is actually a radiant sentient. Go to 703[/b].

702.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south over the rolling hills
702.text: The silence of the lush valley puts you in a semi-meditative state. Go to 701[/b].

703.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the slow sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
703.text: You spin around a rocky column before darting north. Go to 704[/b].
You stick to an old path as you trek south. Go to 702[/b].

704.text: The path forks into dramatically different routes. Choose one:

choices.option: Hike north down into the cloudy valley
choices.outcome: Go to 705[/b].

choices.option: Hike up the mountain path into the cave
choices.outcome: Go to cave 050[/b].

705.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north down into the valley, steering far right
705.text: You weave through the peculiar rock formations and navigate a thick layer of clouds and emerge along a cliffside to see a colossal flying creature. Go to 706[/b] and gain 1 morale.

705.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up out of the clouds
705.text: The alpine landscape is beautiful in a severe way, and you have to remind yourself to watch your footing. Go to 704[/b].

706.text: You are careful with every step into the mist as you hike into rocky terrain. Go to 200[/b].

706.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up a steep hill
706.text: The anomalous geology of the area forces you to take a long, winding path up the hillside. Go to 705[/b] and gain 1 morale.

707.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south around a large stone building

choices.outcome: The building is impressive and stately without being bombastic. Go to 321[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 look to inspect the northern face of the building
choices.outcome: You find a secret entrance into the building. Go to interior 567[/b].

708.text: You vault over a deep fissure in the ground and notice that the clouds here move a little strangely. Go to 714[/b].

708.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
708.text: The sentient is apparently too hysterical to follow you. Go to 709[/b].

709.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up a large column of stone and vines
709.text: You clamber around the massive column and try your hardest not to look down. Go to 710[/b].

710.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down the steep cliff
710.text: After you cross the stream feeding the waterfall, you slowly climb down the nearly sheer cliff face to a rocky plain below. Go to 711[/b] and gain 1 morale.

710.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down a pillar of stone and vines
710.text: The climb down the stone column is demanding, but at least the rock formations here offer plenty of handholds. Go to 709[/b].

711.action: [b][MOVE] ENTER[/b] the ruins or [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] around the ruins to the north

choices.outcome: Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go to interior 547[/b].
Lose 1 health unless the animal is no longer an obstacle, then go north to 712[/b].

711.text: The cool breeze offers a little relief during the long ascent, and at the top you find a grassy ledge eroded by a small waterfall. Go to 710[/b] and gain 1 morale.

712.text: The long hike through the clouds leaves you tired. Go to 201[/b].

712.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up a rocky peak
712.text: Gain 1 morale. You may either enter some ancient ruins (go to interior 547[/b]) or walk around them to location 711[/b].

713.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north through the clouds into the valley below
713.text: There’s something enigmatic about the cloud formations you climb through, but you can’t quite put it in words. Go to 714[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You see a wide stone structure rise gently through the trees. Go to 322[/b].

714.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the slow sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
714.text: The clouds part as you dash through them. Go to 715[/b].
You vault across a narrow but deep gorge, and the clouds start to thin out as you move west. Go to 708[/b].

715.text: Even with a running start and the mercifully lower gravity in this part of the world, you barely manage to clear the deep, cloudy fissure. Go to 721[/b] and gain 1 morale.

715.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north through a winding series of rock pillars
715.text: You slowly clamber up the bizarre, pillared landscape, and when you look down, you see that layers of mist shroud whatever surface lies far, far below. Go to 716[/b] and gain 1 morale.

716.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward the source of the waterfall
716.text: The slope is unforgiving, but the view is breathtaking. Go to 717[/b].

716.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down rock pillars and floating boulders
716.text: You can’t see the bottoms of the interlocking chasms through the fog stirring between the irregular pillars—an observation you try to keep from your conscious mind as you painstakingly descend to a narrow land bridge below. Gain ability 1491[/b] and 1 morale; go to 715[/b].

717.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] north around the rim of the pool
717.text: Like one of your cats, you use both legs and arms to balance on the rock as you circumvent the pool. Go to 718[/b].

717.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south toward the head of a trail
717.text: The severe landscape here is gorgeous, and you have to remind yourself to watch your step. Go to 716[/b].
You manage to scramble down the cliff face through a layer of fog to a rocky plain below. Go to 711[/b] and gain 1 morale.

718.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north across the gap and stroll through a gap in the mountains
718.text: You find yourself in a sunny clearing occupied by a metal sentient. Go to 202[/b].

718.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] south around a shimmering pool of water
718.text: You teeter on the water’s edge, tempted to jump in. Go to 717[/b].

719.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north down into the clouds
719.text: The long climb through the layers of clouds to the humid valley below is tiring. Go to 720[/b] and gain 1 morale.

720.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] south to a mountain peak above the clouds
720.text: The climb along the bare rock face through strata of clouds is exhausting. Go to 719[/b] and gain 1 morale.

721.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] east ahead of the falling rocks
721.text: The rocks are fast, but in the low gravity here you manage to be faster. Go to 727[/b].

721.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] north through the avalanche of boulders
721.text: You leap for your life as you spring frog-like through the unceasing, erratic cascade of boulders. Go to 722[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Even with the forgivingly low gravity in this part of the world, you barely manage to clear the bottomless-looking fissure. Go to 715[/b] and gain 1 morale.

722.text: Clearing this particular gap ignites in you an unexpectedly strong sense of satisfaction. Go to 723[/b] and gain 1 morale.

722.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] south through the cascade of boulders
722.text: The deafening crashing of the boulders is as disorienting as it is worrying, but you manage to weave to safety through the relentless avalanche of stone. Go to 721[/b] and gain 1 morale.

723.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north through the cloud cover
723.text: The clouds here are thick, and you have to backtrack along trails more than once. Go to 724[/b].
A break in the thick clouds reveals the cliff on the other side of the gap, and with a running start you manage to clear the break. Go to 722[/b] and gain 1 morale.

724.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south through the low clouds
724.text: The dense fog slows your progress through the mountains, but you manage to reach a small, rocky plain. Go to 723[/b].

725.text: Your arm hair stands on end as you approach two spires to the east. Go to 409[/b].
The green gully stretches far into the distance. Go to 726[/b].

726.action: [b][MOVE] GUIDE[/b] the pair of sentients away from the aggressor (if the massive creature is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
726.text: The sentients give you a small token of their appreciation (gain item 876[/b]) before scampering away. Go north to 727[/b], east to 410[/b], south to 725[/b], or west to 720[/b].
You spot a signpost to the south that might help explain the strange runes in this region. Go to 725[/b].

727.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] north around the falling rocks
727.text: The welcoming committee leaves something to be desired, but you’ve never seen a city carved into a cliffside before. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to city 523[/b] and gain 1 random skill.
Go to 728[/b].

727.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] west toward the source of the falling rocks
727.text: Probably this route isn’t the safest way to go west from here, but you manage to dodge the boulders spinning down the hill. Go to 721[/b].

728.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] north under the sentient into the valley
728.text: There’s something unsettling about the air in the valley. Go to 729[/b].

728.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south either into the city or around it
728.text: Low gravity or not, the blustery weather and constant cascade of rocks makes the city a dangerous one to navigate. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to 727[/b].

choices.option: ENTER the city through a back entrance
choices.outcome: Go to city 523[/b].

729.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
729.text: You give the elemental and the maelstrom of rocks roaring around it a wide berth as you slip off to the north. Go to 730[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

730.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north toward some floating islands
730.text: At the north edge of the mining complex is an endless archipelago of floating rocks. Go to 204[/b].

730.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south to face the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
730.text: The whirlwind of rocks is dangerous and unsettling, but at least it makes you harder to spot. Go to 729[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

731.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south to a hut perched on a tiny island
731.text: You swim away from the flotsam through the warm water to the cabana beyond. Go to 476[/b].
You follow the trail of wreckage to the western shoreline. Go to 432[/b].

732.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] far north to a hidden cove
732.text: It’s a long but leisurely swim, and as you approach the cove you see something glowing above the waves. Go to 733[/b].

733.text: The humidity in the jungle has you sweating buckets as you head north. Go to 734[/b].

733.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] far south toward an overgrown island
733.text: As you swim closer to the island, you realize that the vines and foliage are covering the husk of a spaceship. Go to 732[/b].

734.text: You slash through the jungle, breaking free into the desert. Go to 735[/b].
You blaze through the thick jungle, circumventing a landmark that seems to attract a number of sentients. Go to 733[/b].

734.action: [b][MOVE] BALANCE[/b] west across the rickety bridge
734.text: The bridge leads into a dark passage through the pillar of stone. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all look[/b] results. If you pay 1 look[/b], you find something in the darkness (gain item 1263[/b]). Go west to 435[/b].

735.text: You immediately regret going out into the sun, as the sand is scorching hot. Suffer 1 heat damage and go to 736[/b].
The desert abruptly changes into a jungle as you head south. Go to 734[/b].

736.text: Despite your careful steps, several wedges of glass slice your skin. Lose 1 health and go to 486[/b].
South of the field of glass is a sentient concentrating in the sun. You duck into some shade to observe them. Go to 735[/b].

737.text: You swim east toward several sentients. Go to 743[/b].

737.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north to a bustling island
737.text: You step over the floating barrier and wade through the knee-high water around the nearby island to one farther in the distance. Go to 738[/b].

738.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] north toward a towering island in the distance

choices.outcome: Go to city 527[/b] and gain 1 random skill:
As you wade through the tide, you pass through the orb on the right. Look at page 5 of the Book of Vantages; your current area is SE-2. Gain 1 boost and go to 739[/b].

738.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward a tiny island
738.text: The netting around this island prevents you from getting too close to shore, but you can still stand in the shallow water. Go to 737[/b].

739.text: It seems that everywhere you swim in this archipelago features another lush, populated island. Go to 745[/b].

739.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north toward the jungle shoreline
739.text: You pull yourself ashore and hack through a small but thick jungle and into a pleasant glade. Go to 740[/b].

739.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] south toward a coastal city
739.text: You hear the relaxed revelry of people presumably having a better week than you are. Choose one:Go to city 527[/b].Circumnavigate the city toward another island (go to location 738[/b]).

740.text: As you emerge from the jungle the towering gateway comes into clear view, a yellow sunset still impossibly glowing through it. Go to 741[/b].
As you swim by, raucous cheers spill out from an overgrown but not quite natural-looking island. Go to 739[/b].

741.action: [b][MOVE] TRUDGE[/b] north across the sand around the gateway
741.text: Based on what you can see through the gateway, you have two options: desert here or desert there. You’re already here, so you head north around the gateway. Go to 742[/b].
You cut vines to forge a path—however temporary—to an open glade. Go to 740[/b].

742.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the surprisingly speedy sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
742.text: You dash around the monumental sentient and don’t stop until you reach a chasm. Go to 487[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
As you kick up sand, you come upon a stone arch, the center of which looks out of place. Go to 741[/b].

743.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east toward some stones in the water
743.text: As you wade east, a pink ink-like substance seeps around you in the water. Go to 749[/b].
The ocean floor drops off precipitously, and all you can see below you are hazy silhouettes of tall, organic structures. Go to 478[/b].
As you swim, you take a moment to appreciate how amazing it is that this planet has all the elements of life that you need to survive. The ship could have crashed on far worse worlds. Go to 737[/b].

744.text: You wade peacefully through the shallow water to another inhabited island. Go to 745[/b].

745.text: You wade through the gentle currents toward a cluster of bright orange huts on the next island south. Go to 744[/b].

745.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] west toward a towering island
745.text: As you swim through the calm water, you notice that no boats sail through this part of the archipelago. Go to 739[/b].

746.text: Apparently because of some hydrologic anomaly, the humid jungle abruptly gives way to dry desert hills. Go to 747[/b].

747.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north up the winding path
747.text: The walk is tiring. “I don’t like sand,” you think to yourself. “It’s coarse and rough and irritating and it gets everywhere.” Go to 748[/b].

747.action: [b][MOVE] TRAILBLAZE[/b] south out of the desert through the dense jungle
747.text: When you emerge from the jungle, you find yourself in a secluded resort. Go to 746[/b].

748.text: The sounds of the city are soon replaced by the cheers of racing fans. Go to 754[/b].
The sandstone and glass structures are even more impressive as you near the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You find a dusty back entrance. Go to city 531[/b].
Go to 488[/b].

748.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south down a winding path
748.text: You find some respite from the heat in the shade of a large, sun-bleached plant. Go to 747[/b].

749.text: You quickly find yourself in deeper yet calmer waters. Go to 479[/b].
By remaining close to the shoreline, you’re able to wade west instead of swimming. Go to 743[/b].

750.text: The current pushes you toward the rocky shoreline. Go to 756[/b].

750.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the kraken (if the kraken is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
750.text: You swim a long course through the choppy waters surrounding the colossal sea creature and reach a (much calmer) shoreline. Go to 751[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

751.text: The trek is long, and as you crest the mountain ridge you feel static build up in your augsuit. Go to 752[/b].

751.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] south past the kraken (if the kraken is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
751.text: You swim a long way around the thrashing behemoth. Go to 750[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

752.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north past the elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
752.text: The air is thick with the static of the elemental’s discharges, giving you the feeling you’re being watched, but you don’t seem to have aroused the elemental’s interest. Go to 753[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.
The terrain quickly becomes more pleasant and you saunter down a long, sloping grassy hill. Go to 751[/b].

753.text: The members of the caravan don’t seem to mind you bringing up the rear; “bandit bait,” one of them mutters. Go to 754[/b].

753.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a hulking elemental (if the elemental is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
753.text: Even before you see the elemental, you can feel an ominous static charge building up in your augsuit. Go to 752[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

754.text: You avoid the clouds of dust spun up by the racers. Go to 489[/b].
The walk south offers some sporadic—but highly welcome—patches of shade. Go to 753[/b].

755.text: The tide guides you through the rocks that jut out of the water. Go to 756[/b].
As you swim south the wreckage thins out and the islands give way to the wide sea beyond. Go to 480[/b].

756.text: The tide presses relentlessly toward the shore, offsetting every two strokes of progress north with one to the east. Go to 757[/b].
While you swim the waves carry the occasional splinter or broken board past you. Go to 755[/b].

756.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west toward a large, pink beast
756.text: The tide tugs at your body as you wade west, but you keep your footing. Go to 750[/b].

757.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] east through the calm water
757.text: As you swim east, the crystal clear water turns a darker shade, possibly the result of pollution from the nearby city. Go to 457[/b].

757.action: [b][MOVE] CLIMB[/b] north up the slippery cliffs
757.text: Halfway up the slick rocks your fingers already ache, and you can’t help but feel that these cliffs are better suited for admiring than for climbing. Go to 758[/b] and gain 1 morale.
Never straying too far from the shoreline, you make your way through a rocky arch to the next beach to the south. Go to 756[/b].

758.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the beast (if the beast is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
758.text: The beast is preoccupied and you manage to avoid its attention (or perhaps it’s decided that you would be too insubstantial a snack to be worth the effort of chasing you down). Go to 759[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

758.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the slippery cliff
758.text: The landscape changes rapidly as you hurry down the slope toward a flash of blue. Go to 757[/b].

759.text: You awkwardly trudge down the hot sand toward the edge of a vast city. Go to 459[/b].

759.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
759.text: The sentients can’t resist a good footrace, and they applaud your speed. Go to 760[/b]; if this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale.

076.text: As you race forward, the floor gives out from under you and you tumble into a pit. Lose 1 health and go to interior 799[/b].

760.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east down the shoreside cliff
760.text: The clamor of battle gives way to the roar of the crashing waves below. Go to 460[/b].
You sneak around the edge of the fighting and, at least for the moment, the battle is someone else’s problem. Go to 490[/b].

761.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] north along the path outside the city
761.text: A wall sits directly to the north. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The path leads to a beach. Go to 456[/b].

choices.option: Pay 1 move to climb the wall
choices.outcome: Go to 762[/b].

761.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south far away from the city
761.text: As the city recedes behind you, you find yourself among rolling green hills. Go to 696[/b].

762.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] south through a small gate
762.text: One of the few gates in the massive wall surrounding the capital city happens to be just south of here. Go to 761[/b].

762.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] west from the city wall into the moat
762.text: You gag at the smell of fish and salt as you descend from the wall out of the city. Go to 456[/b].

763.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] a sentient north through the city
763.text: With so many possible places to go in this city, you decide to follow someone who seems to know where they’re going. Soon they’re joined by others in the streets heading in the same direction. Go to 764[/b].

763.action: [b][MOVE] SQUEEZE[/b] west through gaps in the old city ruins along the shoreline
763.text: Almost immediately after squeezing through the wall, it’s much quieter, almost serene. Go to 457[/b].

764.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] west out of the city
764.text: You slip through a gate as the sentients’ euphoria and merriment carries on behind you. Go to 458[/b].

765.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] west out of the city
765.text: Several vacant houses are built into the city wall, allowing easy passage to the west. Go to 459[/b].

766.action: [b][MOVE] FOLLOW[/b] the balloon from the city below as it drifts to the north
766.text: The balloon moves slowly enough that it’s no trouble to track it, but you do have to climb over the city wall to keep pace with it. Go to 345[/b].

766.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west out of the city through a shipyard
766.text: To the west is a large gateway for ships to pass in and out of the city. Several vessels are under construction just outside of the gate. Go to 460[/b].

767.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south away from the city
767.text: It’s a long walk through the forest and to the pastures beyond. Go to 697[/b].

768.action: [b][MOVE] WALK[/b] west through the busy city streets
768.text: You emerge in a grove inside the city walls. Go to 762[/b].

769.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north down a steep staircase
769.text: When you reach the bottom of the long staircase, you’re greeted by the sounds and smells of a harbor. Go to 770[/b].

770.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south up a steep staircase
770.text: You’re grateful for years of exercise up and down the steps at your house. Go to 769[/b].

771.text: After you land on the other side of the canal, you find yourself at the base of a massive, open-air building. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 move to enter the building
choices.outcome: Go to interior 583[/b].

choices.option: Walk up to the path leading away from the building
choices.outcome: Go to 777[/b].

772.text: This might not be the cleanest waterway in which you’ve swum; eventually you pull yourself ashore in front of a looming tower. Go to 346[/b].

773.text: Apparently uninterested in looking for a more conventional route to the city, you climb over the wall and find yourself in a searingly hot industrial district. Go to 774[/b].

773.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south across a pleasant green pasture
773.text: You walk in and out of patches of fog as the sounds of the city give way to the chirping of birds. Go to 698[/b].

774.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] north around the fiery sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
774.text: Sentients or no sentients, flames are everywhere in this district, and you barely manage to avoid catching fire as you head north. Go to 775[/b].

774.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the wall out of the city
774.text: Even the massive city wall here is hot to the touch, but you find immediate relief on the other side. Go to 773[/b].

775.action: [b][MOVE] HIDE[/b] in the bushes until the sentient passes (reduce this cost to 1 if the sentient is no longer an obstacle)
775.text: You feel like a little kid again as you hide in the bushes. Go north to 776[/b].

776.text: You navigate through the sprawling web of market stalls, where vendors swap stamps, books, fabrics, and a thousand other items. Go to 777[/b].

777.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] up the path while the sentry is on the other side of the building
777.text: The path leads to a majestic building. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to interior 583[/b].
Go to 778[/b].

777.text: The canal runs north to south from a harbor through the city. Your leap clears it with room to spare. Go to 771[/b].

778.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out of the city
778.text: You’ve reached the northern edge of the city, and you exit through a gap in the wall. Go to 347[/b].

778.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] south toward a building on a hill
778.text: You push through ornamental foliage and see the entrance to a grand building on the hill. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 move to enter the building
choices.outcome: Go to interior 583[/b].
Go to 777[/b].

778.text: You dive into the cool waters of the bay below. Go to 772[/b].

779.text: The ivy makes the wall quite easy to climb. Go to 780[/b].

779.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south away from the city
779.text: It’s a long hike across a plain and through a forest, and you’re happy when the noisy bustle of the city gives way to the gentle oom-ing of birds. Go to 699[/b] and gain 1 morale.

078.text: You try not to look down as you descend the tower. Go to 347[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The wind presses you against the tower as you make the steep descent. Go to 176[/b] and gain 1 morale.
The tower has few handholds, but you’ve trained with less. Go to 346[/b] and gain 1 morale.
You feel like you’re on top of the world as you slide down the side of the tower. Go to 345[/b] and gain 1 morale.

780.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] south out of the city via the rapids
780.text: The aqueduct acts as a water slide, jetting you out into the city moat. Go to 779[/b].

781.text: You’re impressed by the extensive system of aqueducts and canals in this city. Go to 787[/b].

782.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north around the sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
782.text: You slip through the dense greenery to an open street to the north. Go to 783[/b].

783.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the sentients as you proceed north
783.text: The street leads to a glimmering building. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 1 look to find a secret entrance
choices.outcome: Go to cave 030[/b].

choices.option: Follow the street to the north
choices.outcome: Go to 784[/b].

783.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] south past a few sentients (if the sentients are no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
783.text: You sneak past several leaf sentients as you head south toward a lush garden. Go to 782[/b].

784.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out of the city
784.text: Beyond the northern city wall you can see windswept dustlands. Go to 348[/b].

785.text: You pull yourself up to the entrance of the city, just behind a group of armed guards. You can either proceed into the city to the northwest (go to 780[/b]) or follow the guards north atop the wall surrounding the city (go to 786[/b]).
Your legs are soon caked in mud as you wade under the bridge. Go to 389[/b].

785.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] east across the muddy river
785.text: You decide you’d rather splash around in the muck, no matter what the bridge toll may be. Go to 388[/b].

785.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] south toward a rolling grassland
785.text: The bustling noise of the city fades as you hike through the rolling grassland to the south. Go to 700[/b].

785.action: [b][MOVE] WADE[/b] west against a torrent of water gushing out of the city
785.text: You push against the water, which turns out to be refreshingly clean. Go to 779[/b].

786.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] east down a narrow staircase leading out of the city
786.text: The narrow width of the staircase reminds you of the conservation of space on your ship. Go to 389[/b].

786.action: [b][MOVE] DESCEND[/b] south down the wall into the city moat
786.text: You can’t find a staircase down from the wall, so you do your best to rappel down the ancient stones. Go to 785[/b].

787.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] east out of the city
787.text: You find that it is much easier to exit the capital city than to enter. Go to 390[/b].
You try not to think about the possibility of slipping on the slick rocks as you leap across the gap. Go to 781[/b].

788.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] east out of the city
788.text: A sentient, noticing your desire to leave, presses a combination of stones in the wall to open a slim gap. Go to 391[/b].
Go to 789[/b], grabbing what you think is a piece of fruit as you go. Gain item 1021[/b].

789.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] east out of the city
789.text: You walk down an alley that ends in a small gate leading out of the city. Go to 392[/b].
You dash past and find yourself in a park that feels, for lack of a better word, magical. Go north to 790[/b].

079.action: [b][MOVE] DODGE[/b] boulders as you proceed down toward the central pillar
079.text: Inside the pillar is a narrow, dark staircase that leads you even deeper into the planet. Go to cave 046[/b] and gain 1 morale.

790.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] east out of the city
790.text: You drop from the branches of a tree directly in front of a monstrous elemental. Go to 393[/b].

790.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out of the city
790.text: Vast dunes await you to the north of the capital city. Go to 349[/b].

791.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] far north to a hidden cove after exiting the crumbling ship
791.text: The swim is long but the water is a pleasant temperature, and as you near the cove you see something glowing above it. Go to 733[/b].

080.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north past the sentient (if the sentient is no longer an obstacle, reduce the cost to 1)
080.text: You crash through a thin wall in the rear of the cavern. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 014[/b]; keep this location for reference.

801.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] east into the sea below
801.text: You belly flop into the waves and tread water toward a large device floating in the water. Go to 405[/b].

801.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] north into the sea below
801.text: You dive into the water with a mighty splash and drift to shore. Go to 309[/b].

801.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] south into the sea below
801.text: You swan dive into the sea and let the current pull you to shore. Go to 374[/b].

801.action: [b][MOVE] DIVE[/b] west into the sea below
801.text: You plunge into the water and float to the edge of an island. Go to 308[/b].

081.text: Several wires lead through a cramped passage that thankfully widens after a brief moment of panic. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 015[/b]; keep this location for reference.

082.text: Confident on the ice, you break off a piece of the crystal as you glide past it. Gain item 1160[/b]. The frozen stream slopes downward, leading you deeper into the planet. Go to cave 047[/b].

083.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] north through some glowing sediment in the rear of the cavern
083.text: Your hands are caked with dirt as you stumble into a narrow passage. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 016[/b]; keep this location for reference.

085.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north out of the sweaty arena
085.text: You stink of sweat, smoke, and spilled booze by the time you reach the far side of the room. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 019[/b]; keep this location for reference.

086.text: If you aim your long leap at the crystal perfectly by paying 1 look[/b] or 1 boost, you land on top of it, breaking off a piece (gain item 1162[/b]). Either way, you follow the passage on the far side of the magma, barely avoiding increasingly large shards that protrude from the cave walls. Advance deeper into the planet to cave 049[/b].

087.action: [b][MOVE] SCALE[/b] north up the scaffolding toward an exit
087.text: At the top, you find a narrow, unguarded passage that leads even deeper into the planet. Go to cave 049[/b].

088.action: [b][MOVE] PUSH[/b] east through the soft, glowing sediment
088.text: The soil gives way, and you emerge even deeper into the planet to dungeon 017[/b]; keep this location for reference.

The roots are endless, and there is a moment when you wonder if you’ve gone too far. It’s then that you see a staircase spiraling around the massive roots. You follow it up into a bustling city. Go to city 519[/b] and gain 1 morale

089.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] the cavern, careful not to trigger the lasers
089.text: The laser array is set up to prevent someone from entering the cave, but not necessarily someone who is trying to leave. Go to cave 029[/b].

090.action: [b][MOVE] EXIT[/b] north through the golden doorway
090.text: You climb a narrow flight of stairs, at the top of which are some overgrown bushes. Pushing them aside, you emerge in the middle of some ancient ruins. Go to interior 548[/b].

091.action: [b][MOVE] SNEAK[/b] north past the serpent (if the serpent is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
091.text: With great care, you tiptoe past the serpent toward a narrow passage. Go deeper into the planet to dungeon 594[/b]; keep this location for reference. If this action’s cost was not reduced to 1, also gain 1 morale

092.action: [b][MOVE] SWIM[/b] north through one of the rear openings to proceed deeper into the cave
092.text: After a short swim, you bizarrely pull yourself out horizontally through a wall of water into an open cave. Advance deeper into the planet to cave 049[/b].

093.action: [b][MOVE] TREK[/b] north over the top of the maze
093.text: The journey feels endless, as no path leads directly to the far exit. Finally you reach the light at the end of the tunnel. Go deeper into the planet to cave 043[/b] and gain 1 morale

094.action: [b][MOVE] HIKE[/b] north through the hollow mountain
094.text: You hug the steel walls of the cave as you move around the city. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Go to dungeon 595[/b]. Keep this location for reference.

choices.option: Find a back entrance to the city
choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice and keep all look[/b] results. If you pay 1 look[/b], go to city 041[/b]. Otherwise, go deeper into the planet to dungeon 595[/b] and keep this location for reference.

095.text: You head north, trying to avoid stepping on any eggs. Roll 2 skill dice and gain all move[/b] results. Unless you pay 1 move[/b], you accidentally crush one of the eggs, and their parent swipes at you (lose 1 health). Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

096.action: [b][MOVE] EVADE[/b] the dragon (if the animal is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
096.text: The dragon must not be hungry, as it shows no interest in chasing you, even after you exit the tunnel into its vast golden grotto. Advance deeper into the planet to cave 045[/b].

097.action: [b][MOVE] DASH[/b] north through the glowing door in the rear of the cavern (if the noxious gas is no longer an obstacle, reduce this cost to 1)
097.text: You bolt through the nauseating miasma, and soon it thins out enough to be unnoticeable. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 598[/b]; keep this location for reference.

098.action: [b][MOVE] LEAP[/b] north from one root to the next
098.text: Skipping the labyrinthian staircases, you soar directly to the glowing exit. Go deeper into the planet to cave 044[/b].

099.text: Deep in the cavern, you discover a narrow passage. Advance deeper into the planet to dungeon 599[/b]; keep this location for reference.
